programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown - Part 2
programme.desc: A field of 1,360 players is down to six with Maria Ho battling against WPT Champions James Carroll and Eric Afriat for her first WPT title and $715,000 in HyperX Esports Arena in Las Vegas.
programme.sub-title: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown - Part 2

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw - Part 1
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour goes to Durant, Oklahoma for Midwest poker action for WPT Choctaw. A $2 million prize pool is up for grabs as Season XV WPT Choctaw final tablist Craig Varnell plays for his first WPT title and $380,000 at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 1
programme.desc: The best poker players in the world at HyperX Esports Arena to play for $440,000 and the title of \\"Champion of Champions.\\" WPT commentator Tony Dunst is at the final table to battle against Ole Schemion, Nick Schulman, and more!
programme.sub-title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 2
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 4
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Tournament Of Champions - PT1
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Tournament Of Champions - PT2

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 1
programme.desc: Maria Ho, Alex Foxen, Nick Petrangelo, and WPT Champion Sam Panzica are all at this $25,000 buy-in final table looking to win $424,000 and this exclusive title at Commerce Casino in Los Angeles.
programme.sub-title: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 1

programme.title: Andromeda: Svar gitt på spørsmål som aldri er stilt
programme.desc: En melding fra en samler sender Dylan på et oppdrag for å redde et gissel og finne restene av Commonwealth-flåten.
programme.sub-title: Svar gitt på spørsmål som aldri er stilt

programme.title: Andromeda: Biter av åtte
programme.desc: Citizen Eight prøver å fjerne Dylan fra kommandoen over Andromeda.

programme.title: Andromeda: Waking the Tyrant's Device
programme.desc: Mannskapet må stoppe en verdensbygger før han setter i gang en annen invasjon.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dobbelt eller ingenting
programme.desc: Dylan blir kidnappet av Nietzscheans og tvunget til å spille tankespill til underholdning for fangene hans.

programme.title: Andromeda: Harper/Slett
programme.desc: To Nietzschean-søsken er i en avstand over et våpen som kan eliminere høyere hjernefunksjoner.

programme.title: Andromeda: Snart den nærende virvelen
programme.desc: Tyr kommer tilbake, etter å ha sluttet seg til Collectors, og krever aldersruten fra sine tidligere besetningsmedlemmer.

programme.title: Andromeda: Verden snur seg rundt henne
programme.desc: En gisselsituasjon oppstår når mannskapet konfronterer Tyr.

programme.title: Andromeda: Kanal til skjebne
programme.desc: En feil sving i glidestrømmen fører Andromeda til et fengselsopprør.

programme.title: Andromeda: Machines of the Mind
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet går opp for å finne ut hvem som drepte en gruppe forskere.

programme.title: Andromeda: Opphøyet grunn, strålende datter
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet går opp for å finne ut hvem som drepte en gruppe forskere.

programme.title: Andromeda: Torment, the Release
programme.desc: Samlerne kontrollerer nå Commonwealth og setter Andromeda-mannskapet for retten.

programme.title: Andromeda: Spider's Stratagem
programme.desc: Andromeda oppdager en forsendelse med biorustning.

programme.title: Andromeda: Varmen fra et usynlig lys
programme.desc: En eksperimentell tilsløringsenhet slipper Dylan inn i et alternativt univers.

programme.title: Andromeda: De andre
programme.desc: Andromeda blir fanget i en krig mellom to skip, og den inkluderer en dødelig sykdom.

programme.title: Andromeda: Frykt brenner ned til aske
programme.desc: Dylan blir lurt av Rev og kidnappet. Mannskapet finner en uventet alliert i en samler.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tapt i et rom som ikke er der
programme.desc: Abyss har smittet Beka. Mannskapet må finne en måte å redde henne på.
programme.sub-title: Tapt i et rom som ikke er der

programme.title: Andromeda: Forkortelse av djevelens skille
programme.desc: Etter at noe av mannskapet er fanget, blir Harper tvunget til å jobbe på en tidsbro for patriarken.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stoler på Gordian Maze
programme.desc: En spion fra Tri Gemma dukker opp på Andromeda i et forsøk på å stjele stjernekartet.

programme.title: Andromeda: En symmetri av ufullkommenhet
programme.desc: Når Rommie blir for emosjonell, kutter skipet hennes tilgang til diagnostikk.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tid ute av sinn
programme.desc: Abyss dreper Bekas venn, og mannskapet må finne ut hvilken informasjon de drepte for.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dissonantintervallet (del 1)
programme.desc: Andromeda redder et skip som returnerer fra fredsforhandlinger med Magog.

programme.title: MTV Catfish
programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.title: MTV Catfish
programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: In 1996, Virginia Beach police arrive at the Makdessi apartment to find the bloodied bodies of Elise Makdessi and Navy sailor Quincy Brown. But was Brown Elise's lover or her assailant?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing with the Devil
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: In 2000, the body of exotic dancer Rachel Siani was found beneath a New Jersey bridge. Investigators wondered if she had committed suicide. They discovered that Rachel offered to assist a drunk customer named John "Jack" Denofa to his motel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Criticism
programme.desc: In 2000, construction manager Darrell North was found dead in his work trailer in Ft. Worth, Texas. When investigators arrived, they found that he had been stabbed 46 times, indicating a personal relationship between the victim and the attacker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home. When her son stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up, police were skeptical.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: In the early hours of a morning just before Christmas, a college student was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment. Her body was found later that day; she had been sexually assaulted and shot at point-blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others. But when they discover blood spatter in her boyfriend's bedroom, they know this case is going to be different.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than thirty times and the crime scene was awash with her blood. Near her head, police discovered a distinctive button with strands of thread still attached.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services, then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera footage shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: The woman had been sexually assaulted, stabbed repeatedly and left for dead. When a perfect suspect practically turned himself in, police were sure they had their man until DNA evidence proved them wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: When court clerk Peter Porco doesn't report to work in November 2004, a courts officer is ordered to the Porcos' family home in Bethlehem, NY.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: This episode documents a deadly bombing at a church in Oakwood, Illinois, in December 1997.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room with a View
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 2005, a man's body is found burning near Baltimore. He's eventually identified as 26-year-old Wesley Person. Distinctive building materials from the 1930s play a crucial role in solving this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a young scientist has fallen gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All that Glitters is Gold
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered. The similarities of the crime scenes led police to conclude they were dealing with a serial killer who harbored an intense hatred of women.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbour
programme.desc: When a college student vanished without a trace, her fellow students were concerned about her safety and their own.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: In 1985, Julie Estes was kidnapped from the Southside convenience store where she worked. Her body was found the next day, but the killing went unsolved until 2003.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Rudolph on the Run & UD, Racial Rift & UD, Child Prodigies and Lifeguard Missing & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Newlywed Found Dead, Searching for Morgan, Real Dr. Doolittle and Family Man Fugitive.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Wood I Lie to You?, Wanted Weaver & UD, What Happened to Natasha and McDonald's Murder & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Anthrax, Undesirable Desiree & UD, Real Monica and UD: Five Separated Siblings.

programme.desc: This episode includes: Colorado Cop Killer, Playboy Con Man, Larry’s Rampage, Life after Lightning, Mickey Thompson and Missing Gringo.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 2

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: A.W.O.L., Unknown Arsonist, Phoenix UFO, Brandon Lee and Alcatraz.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Texas Most Wanted, Backyard Bones, Pierre's Amnesia, Bad Friday, Missing Bank Executive and Canadian Crop Circles.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fugitive Squirrel, Waag the Dog, Mystery Mummy, Vigilante, Who Plugged Bugsy? and Murder in Connecticut.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Elvis' Last Night, Kecksburg UFO, Casino Cowboy, Dennis Cole's Son and Bad Chief.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kentucky Bomber, Texas A&M Rapist, Ice Woman, One Minute Million, Taking a Dive and Bordeaux Murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Border Line Murder, Sleepwalking, Searcher's Son, Frightened Family and Dennis Keith Smith.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Florida Crime Spree, Bonnie and Clyde 2001, Storm in Hell, Heather Tallchief, Film Student's Death and Bloodhounds.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Massachusetts' Marine, Yeti, Terrorized Teen, Biker and the Vet, Killer Boyfriend and Victor Gerena.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Texas Crime Spree, Who's Tyler?, Inside Frontera, Deadly Doses, The Entity and Disappearing Dad.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Missing on Cruise, Taunting Bank Robber, DEA Agent Death, Bullock's Deadwood, Up In Smoke and Danny and His Dad.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mrs. Rogers, Plateau Vision, War of the Depues, Killer Boyfriend, Medford Millions and Looking For Christopher.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 16
programme.desc: This episode includes: Skull Duggery, Lucky School, Deadly Doses + UD, Drug Playboy, Eleven Million Dollar Heist + UD and Fallen Star.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: En 24/7 kanal for folk som er nyskjerrige på mote og design! Supermodellen Heidi Klum er vert for denne spennende reality-serien som gir sultne, talentfulle designere sjansen til å vise frem sitt arbeid for New York.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: En 24/7 kanal for folk som er nyskjerrige på mote og design! Supermodellen Heidi Klum er vert for denne spennende reality-serien som gir sultne, talentfulle designere sjansen til å vise frem sitt arbeid for New York.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Murdering Cowboy
programme.desc: The sun set on the Wild West long ago, but some people refused to notice. Claude Dallas was one of them. A wily trapper, Dallas typified the rugged individualism that forged this country. He went too far when he killed two game wardens in 1981.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Death Grip
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The Identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blood Money
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Killing Time
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blind Trust
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Double Helix
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis, another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrived.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Electronic Witness
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Patterns Of Guilt
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Texas Rangers
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Impressions
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Burning Evidence
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Price of Murder
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Critical Evidence
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Predators and Parasites
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Military Justice
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: "To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth."

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bodies of Evidence
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Target
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to Derbyshire to investigate the New Mills Arts Theatre. This quirky little building has played host to many famous acts and world-renowned plays but has a little-known secret in that it's allegedly haunted.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 2
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team is ready for act II at the New Mills Arts Theatre. With so much apparent activity happening at this unassuming theatre, the team just couldn't leave when so much more could happen.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunted Weir Mill
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team visits Weir Mill, the oldest and most paranormally active mill in Stockport.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Old Glen and Milner Curse
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team heads to Shipley, West Yorkshire to investigate The Old Glen House Pub.
programme.sub-title: The Old Glen and Milner Curse

programme.title: Past Hunters: Bulkeley Hotel
programme.desc: The former home of Queen Victoria is now home to many spirits who have been seen by guests and staff. Witness the first ever formal documentation of the paranormal activities in the Bulkeley Hotel.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: House of Horror
programme.desc: Blackpool is iconic for ghosts and tonight, Sean and Bex investigate a horror attraction which appears to have attracted some very real spirits that are spooking its customers.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Long Lost Treasure at Jessops Old Mill and Auction House
programme.desc: The ghost dimension team visits Batley, West Yorkshire to investigate a location where it may not be the building that's haunted but the items that reside within.
programme.sub-title: Long Lost Treasure at Jessops Old Mill and Auction House

programme.title: Past Hunters: Blackpool Pleasure Beach
programme.desc: Blackpool Pleasure Beach is one of the most visited attractions in the United Kingdom. People visit it not only for the fun, but to also hopefully catch a glimpse of the many ghosts that haunt there.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Forgotten Souls of Errwood Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to the Errwood Hall ruins in the Goyt Valley. It is said to be haunted by 3 spirits, and that it has its very own time slip. The investigation does not disappoint and although the hall is gone, the spirits remain.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghost in the Shower
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Waterloo Rugby Club and come into contact with a very mischievous spirit in the male showers! A ghost that scares away any female that dares to enter.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Drakelow Tunnels
programme.desc: The Drakelow Tunnels are a former underground military complexused mainly for storage. However, during the construction and running of this facility, 6 people are thought to have died.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Mischievous Ghost of The Kings Arms Hotel
programme.desc: Sean investigates claims that a mischievous ghost going by the name of Alice is causing havoc at The Kings Arms Hotel. This is one night at a hotel that the team will not rest.
programme.sub-title: The Mischievous Ghost of The Kings Arms Hotel

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Lady in Grey
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate ruins of The Orangery in Merseyside and claims that the ghost of a grey lady is haunting the location. They capture some of the most compelling paranormal evidence they have ever encountered.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghosts of the Pumping Pit
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension head to Wigan and investigate Aspull Pumping Pit. Built in 1871, the location is currently in ruins and is home to a whole host of paranormal activity. Ghostly entities make contact tonight, in an unforgettable paranormal investigation!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Bump In The Bingo Hall
programme.desc: The team head out to Blackpool for a day out at the seaside that they will never forget. Investigating one of Blackpool's iconic buildings The Empire Bingo Hall. Many famous acts have played here and it seems that some may have never left.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Night Before The Storm
programme.desc: In this special episode, it's the night before Sean and Bex are joined by their celebrity guest and they check out The Black Horse in Pluckley Village to investigate the paranormal hauntings at the most haunted pub in the UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1
programme.desc: The team heads to Lincolnshire to investigate the Village Farm Museum. This location looks out of place, being in the middle of a residential housing estate.
programme.sub-title: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2
programme.desc: This fascinating location sees a twist in the activity with Bex and Sean getting more than they bargained for.
programme.sub-title: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Brookside
programme.desc: Multiple ghostly sightings have been reported that could be connected to the close, but what will Sean and Bex encounter during the day for a special Ghost Dimension Lock Down investigation?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stockport to investigate a haunted mill, which has a lift with a mind all of its own. Will any of the ghosts haunting the mill join him on the investigation tonight or will it all go pear shaped?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: High Class Call Girls
programme.desc: Bambi gives us a rare, honest look into her ultra-exclusive lifestyle in LA. Tiffany confronts C.T. over a rotten business deal.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Holiday Hell With My Feuding Family
programme.desc: There’s no worse time to be fighting with your family than during the holidays. Our old friends Donna and her cheating husband Richard join us for a holiday feast!
programme.sub-title: Holiday Hell With My Feuding Family

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Cheating Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Chris and Steve confess to cheating on their girlfriends and Michelle wants to tell her boyfriend she has a mistress. The tension is high on today's Jerry Springer Show!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: My Pimp Runs My Family
programme.desc: Tracy and Allen have been living in a car. Her two older sisters are here to convince her to temporarily live with them and go back to school until he can provide for them.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I'm Marrying a Transsexual!
programme.desc: Jerry is 58 years old and has had three big changes. He is currently happily engaged to a woman named Joy and speaks about his past gender confusion.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I Have Many Lovers
programme.desc: Today, Rufus comes clean about cheating on Treynae with Cheeta and Rhonda tells her girlfriend Lovette that she's in an affair with another woman! Who will choose whom?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Wife Discovers Husband's Secret Family
programme.desc: Ron left Stacie when she was 8 months pregnant with his child for Audrey and thought he'd found his soul mate. Are Stacie's kids all his? Watch this classic showdown today!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Jerry Rescues An Obese Man
programme.desc: Denny weighs over 800 pounds and has been unable to leave his bed for the past 5 weeks and is ready to change his life. Today we follow Denny's courageous journey.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Woman In Labor Confronts Mistress
programme.desc: The first time Nancy, Tara and Versell appeared on the show, Nancy was pregnant with Versell's baby. He was cheating on her with Tara and now she's pregnant! Who will go?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Jerry is joined by Santa and his elves to answer 7 very special Christmas letters from needy children. Watch these happy faces light up when their holiday wishes are granted!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: You Won't Marry Your Gay Lover!
programme.desc: Friends and family refuse to accept same sex marriage! Martin won’t let his son marry his boyfriend. April wants her ex back, but he’s in love with a man! Who has the final say?
programme.sub-title: You Won't Marry Your Gay Lover!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I Have A Secret For My Man!
programme.desc: Friends Tatiana and Latasha have both been keeping a big secret from their boyfriends! Today they're here to come clean!
programme.sub-title: I Have A Secret For My Man!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I'll Never Let You Go!
programme.desc: Chrishon denies he’s engaged to Taiwana with 3 weeks until their wedding. Lauren confronts her ex for leaving her for another woman while pregnant! Dave still wants Leesa’s love.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Honey… I'm a Call Girl!
programme.desc: Chloe and Dan will tie the knot soon, but she’s finally ready to tell him about her real job. Then, Amanda’s mom begs her to quit her job.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Sizzling Sex Secrets!
programme.desc: Torrance admits to cheating on his girlfriend with a shocking twist. Then, Heather wants her boyfriend’s ex Tramisha to stop interfering with their relationship.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Forbidden Love
programme.desc: At twelve, Crystal dated 20-year-old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months for sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Is this inappropriate love or a misunderstanding?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 16-Year-Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
programme.desc: Sarah was Dawn and Derek's surrogate, but took off while five months pregnant. Sarah claims that they took advantage of her. Who are the baby's rightful parents?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She's a Crazy Stalker
programme.desc: Victor met Jasmine a few years ago but claimed they never had sex. Jasmine claims that they fell in love and want him back! Who's telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?
programme.sub-title: These DNA Results Will Floor You

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Chelse claims that her 19-month-old daughter is Malcolm's and that he beat her while pregnant. Amber and Phillip accuse each other of being abusive and want the polygraph tests to prove their claims!
programme.sub-title: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Tasha wants to prove to her ex Martin that he fathered her four-year-old. Martin's sister says that the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence. Who's the real father?
programme.sub-title: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Bullied Out of School
programme.desc: Aabrea and Jerae bullied a high school girl so badly that she dropped out. Can Steve help them resolve their differences and figure out why so many teens turn to bullying?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Case That Haunts Me
programme.desc: As Det. Joe Kenda digs into another murder, he uncovers a world of violence and sexual fetishes, culminating in perhaps the most intense interrogation of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: We Kill the Ones We Love
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves Van Terry dead; to crack the case, Lt. Joe Kenda must put his faith… in a burglar.
programme.sub-title: We Kill the Ones We Love

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down for no apparent reason. The case kicks into high gear when Lt Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Powder Kegs
programme.desc: When uninvited guests crash a barrio birthday party, violence erupts—leaving Enrique Urrutia dead and potentially sparking a gang war.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Confession
programme.desc: After a husband and wife are viciously attacked in their own home, Kenda is on the hunt for a troubled teen whose appetite for violence knows no bounds.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Joker In the Pack
programme.desc: A card game is interrupted by gunfire, leaving a young man dead. Lt. Joe Kenda soon learns the seeds of his destruction were sewn earlier the same day.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Too Young To Die
programme.desc: A frenzied ambush at a hamburger stand leaves a 16-year old boy dead. Lt. Joe Kenda must cut through a mountain of rumor and innuendo in order to zero in on his prime suspect.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Haunts Me
programme.desc: A young mother-to-be is shot and left for dead. To catch her assailant, Kenda must elicit a death-bed confession from the victim herself.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Razor’s Edge
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Manifesto
programme.desc: A cabin on the slopes of Pikes Peak catches fire, and a young sheriff’s deputy is posted to guard the scene overnight--then he’s found dead in his patrol car the next morning.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Shoelace Killer
programme.desc: A party on the outskirts of the city turns into a nightmare for some teenagers when they discover a woman’s corpse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Weapon of Choice
programme.desc: When mother of two Shaundra Murr is run over in front of her house, officers initially suspect a hit and run. Until Lt. Joe Kenda uncovers evidence proving Shaundra’s murder was a crime of passion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Slaughterhouse Six
programme.desc: Solider and young father Layne Schmidtke is brutally beaten to death by a mob of teenagers. Kenda must reconstruct the chaotic scene through forensic evidence and witness testimonies.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Last Call for Murder
programme.desc: Five people are shot in a cold-blooded robbery. With much of the evidence lost in a fire set by the suspect. An exhaustive manhunt ends in a chilling confrontation with an Eagle Scout turned killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.
programme.sub-title: Bullet With My Name On It

programme.title: Pluto TV Juniorklubben
programme.desc: Hopp inn i en verden av legendarisk førskole med Nick jr. Club! Bli med Dora utforskeren, Blaze og monstermaskinene, Bubble Guppies og Shimmer and Shine på morsomme, lærerike og magiske reiser. Perfekt for små barn for endeløs underholdning!

programme.title: The Hills: Between A Rocker And A Hard Place
programme.desc: Audrinas forhold til Ryan blir satt på prøve når han møter Justin for første gang. Brody er på Kristins side når Allie krangler med henne. Stephanie har en skuffende andre date.
programme.sub-title: Between A Rocker And A Hard Place

programme.title: The Hills: Break-Up to Make-Up
programme.desc: Akkurat da Audrina avslutter ting med Ryan, overrasker Justin henne på bursdagen hennes. McKaelas venn Allie lager mer trøbbel med Kristin. Brody forteller Justin hva han tenker.

programme.title: The Hills: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: På en surfetur til Costa Rica, gjør Kristin Brody sjalu ved å rote med en lokal bartender, Audrina prøver å bekjempe hennes tiltrekning til Justin, og Stephanie finner seg selv på kant med jungelmiljøet.

programme.title: The Hills: Loves Me Not
programme.desc: Kristin har en åpenthjertig samtale med Brody, hun ønsker å gi forholdet en ny sjanse. Heidis mor kommer til LA, i håp om å forsone seg med henne. Lo og kjæresten hennes feirer sitt jubileum, og Stephanie begynner å date en ny.

programme.title: The Hills: All Good Things...
programme.desc: Kristin står overfor en stor avgjørelse som også påvirker Brody. Audrina slår opp med Justin. Lo vet ikke om hun er klar til å ta neste skritt med hennes kjæreste og Stephanie mener hun har endelig funnet sann lykke.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Hold Grudges... JK!
programme.desc: Det er en ny begynnelse for den ikoniske vennegruppen da de kommer tilbake til The Hills og tar opp kontakten etter mange år. Nye utfordringer, gamle feider og romanser kolliderer. Fortiden er nemlig ikke alltid i fortiden.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Not My Family
programme.desc: Stephanie forsøker å reparere forholdet til boren, Spencer. Mischa treffer Perez Hilton, som mobbet henne da hun var skuespiller. Gnisten mellom Audrina og Justin fortsetter å ulme, men Justin kan ha fått øye for noen annen også.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: A Legend in His Own Mind
programme.desc: Audrina får sjokkerende informasjon om Justin Bobby, og tvinges til å etterprøve motivene hans. Sinnene koker når Spencer og Heidi stiller spørsmålstegn ved sitt forhold til Brody. Brandon Thomas Lee arrangere en bassengfest hos sin mor.
programme.sub-title: A Legend in His Own Mind

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Not to Eavesdrop, But to Eavesdrop
programme.desc: Audrina konfronterer Justin med at han nektet å ha kysset henne. Brody klager over forholdet til faren, til Caitlyn, og sin forhenværende bestevenn, Spencer. Spencer og Heidis forhold settes på prøve når de kjemper med å få firmaet til å vokse.
programme.sub-title: Not to Eavesdrop, But to Eavesdrop

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Vegas for å se Brodys DJ-forestilling. Justin finner seg plutselig midt i en konfrontasjon mellom Audrina og Stephanie. Storbrann herjer gjennom Malibu, og Kaitlynn frykter for Brodys liv når han blir værende i evakueringssonen.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Think We Can Be Friends
programme.desc: Brody og Kaitlynn håndterer det ødeleggende etterspillet av Malibu-brannene. Audrina fatter et vanskelig valg om Justin. Samtidig har Mischa en prøvespilling med høy innsats for en filmrolle. Heidi begynner å gjenopplive popstjerne karrieren.
programme.sub-title: I Don't Think We Can Be Friends

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Enemy #1
programme.desc: Sladderen tar fyr og ryktene går etter en skandaløs hendelse med Brody og Stephanie. Audrina blir sjokkert da Justin tar med en hakesleppende date til middagen.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Are We Exclusive?
programme.desc: Kaitlynn & Brody's 'A-liste'-galla splitter gruppen når hun ekskluderer deler av gjengen. Audrina overrasker alle med en nytenning av en lidenskapelig romanse med en gammel flamme. Spencer forbløffer Heidi med en overdådig overraskelse.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: This Hangover Better Be Expensive
programme.desc: Forholdet til Brody og Kaitlynn er stadig anstrengende og de går til en fertilitetsspesialist. Heidi og Spencer forbereder seg for sin kommende wow-fornyelse med duellerende utdrikningslag. Brandon har vanskelig for å definere det nye forholdet.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Brody Gets Away with So Much
programme.desc: Brodys og Kaitlynns ekteskap knaker mens ryktene går om sexlivet deres. Etter å ha hengitt seg til 'eksklusivitet', begynner Brandon å stille spørsmål ved forholdet. Audrina stenger døren til skilsmissen sin og går inn i et nytt forretningsforetak.
programme.sub-title: Brody Gets Away with So Much

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Of Course We're Married
programme.desc: Spencer konfronterer Brody om hans ekteskaps legitimitet og sannheten blir avslørt. Brandon fatter en endelig avgjørelse angående forholdet til Ashley. Whitney deler følelsesladd nytt om sitt privatliv med Kaitlynn.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: What You Missed
programme.desc: Et timelangt spesialprogram midt i sesongen som oppsummerer familiefeider, svik blant bestevenner og umistelige øyeblikk fra denne sesongens New Beginnings.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Burying The Past
programme.desc: Etter nesten et år fra hverandre, gjenforenes gjengen for å begrave fortiden og starte på nytt. Brody prøver å samle kropp og sjel og fokusere på å gjøre det godt igjen etter å ha slått opp med Kaitlynn

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Best Friends Kissing
programme.desc: Brody og Audrina utforsker en ny romanse. Brandon er klar for å utvikle forholdet ytterligere. Heidi og Spencer kjemper for å bli enige om familieforøkning og må avreagere. Jason og Ashley får skjellsettende nyheter.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: Gjengens ferie får en vri da Kaitlynn uventet får møte Brodys nye flamme. Brandon håp om en romantisk tur med Dani settes på spill etter en fatal karrierefeil. Samtidig blomstrer en usannsynlig forbindelse.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Who's a Better Kisser
programme.desc: Brody og Heidis vennskap er i et skjæringspunkt da en middag utvikler seg til en eksplosiv krangel. Brody lurer på om Amber er den rette. Audrinas første kyss med Sean gir flere spørsmål. Justin åpner seg for gruppen.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You Told Her?!
programme.desc: Heidi og Spencer blir sjokkerte over at oppførselen deres blir diskutert. Audrina står ved en korsvei med både Brody og Sean; samtidig foretar Caroline en djerv påstand om sine ekte følelser for Kaitlynn.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I'm Back in LA Bitches!
programme.desc: Gjengen feirer Kristin Cavallaris besøk i LA. Det er anspent mellom Heidi og Audrina. Justin og Jason styrker vennskapet. En bra natt blir til en god morgen da Brody og Audrina endelig setter følelsene sine på prøve.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: "Who Slept at Your House?"
programme.desc: Da Kristin har grillet Brody om 'overnattingen' hos Audrina, går ryktene under en tur til Lake Tahoe, og Kaitlynn føler seg utenfor. Caroline konfronterer Kaitlynn om det kalde vennskapet. Jason hører Spencer tvile på edrueligheten sin.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: War Of Words
programme.desc: Ex On The Beach er tilbake med åtte singler som håper å finne kjærligheten på Bali - men istedenfor erklærer Fatima og Nicole krig. Marty blir betatt av Fatima, og Che og Max liker hverandre - men holder det når eksene begynner komme?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: A Geordie Reunion
programme.desc: Jakten på kjærlighet fortsetter, men problemer oppstår når Chloe fra Geordie Shore avslører sine følelser for Marty. Jordan blir aggressiv mot alle, og feiden mellom Nicole og Fatima når et dramatisk klimaks.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Clash Of The Titans
programme.desc: En supersexy eks ankommer og skaper drama. Jordan er ute etter Chloe, og når Marty søker trøst hos noen andre, blir det et Geordie-oppgjør.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Max Makes His Move
programme.desc: Følelser raser i villaen når Chloe gjør Marty forbanna, Max og Georgias kjærlighet blusser opp igjen, og Dean har planer for Che, men vil en ekskjæreste ødelegge for ham?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Double Ex Rated
programme.desc: Ankomsten til to esker opprører huset. Georgie leker med følelsene til Max. Forholdet til Marty og Chloe settes på prøve når Marty avslører sin pikante, lille hemmeligheten.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Actions Speak Louder Than Words
programme.desc: Terror-nettbrettet skaper kaos på stranden når Stevie får velge hvem som må hjem. Chloe ønsker litt fysisk oppmerksomhet av Sam, og Brads nye kjærlighetsforhold gjør ham overlykkelig.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: The Fight For Georgia
programme.desc: Forholdet til Chloe og Sam er som en berg-og-dal-bane. Max går lei av Stevie og finner noe morsommere et annet sted. Ankomsten til en ny eks får Georgia og Brad til å spore av.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Marty The Meddler
programme.desc: Klørne kommer frem når gruppen drar på en vill safari og Deans alfahann-status blir truet. Marty blander seg i Chloe og Sams forhold, og John har hendene fulle med Georgia.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Love Is In The Air
programme.desc: Terror-nettbrettet har en funksjonsfeil og sender Marty på en date med Sam. En nykommer sender tvillingene ut i kamp, mens John og Georgias forhold bare styrker seg.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: #Ballininbalifinale
programme.desc: Bali-strandfesten får en dramatisk slutt når den siste nyankommeren skaper kaos i villaen. Georgia og John klarer ikke det siste hinderet, og Chloe får endelig det hun vil ha av Sam.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Bobby's Dilemma
programme.desc: Den nye kjærlighetsjakten starter på Mexicos strender. Daisy limer seg på Aaron og Essex-gutten Bobby legger an på Rhianne, men vil den første eksen stikke kjepper i hjulene?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Datingen fortsetter når Bobby og Bayley drar på 'hjerte til hjerte'-date. Aarons hode blir fordreid, men vil han gå fra Daisy? Tre nyankomne får villaen til å ryste i grunnvollene og noen må dra hjem.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Heartbreak And Happiness
programme.desc: Aaron bryter med Daisy, men kan han vinne Dominikas hjerte? En ny eks ankommer og truer med å ødelegge Bobby og Bayleys forhold.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Double Departure
programme.desc: Bobbys hjerte knuses av Bayley og Daisy er bare glad for å plukke opp bitene. Aaron fortsetter å ligge etter Dominika og en VIP-ankomst skaper drama i villaen når et par må dra hjem.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Ex On The Beach er tilbake! Åtte heite single får snart ødelagt tidenes ferie når en av eksene deres ankommer og ødelegger festen! Hat, krangler, tårer, drama, følelser og enda flere ekser!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: To ekser har ankommet villaen og skaper kaos - og det blir verre. Rogans forhold til Anita kan stå i fare for å ødelegges når eksen Jess ankommer. Mere kjærlighet, mere hat - og framfor alt: flere eks-kjærester!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Tre ekser har ankommet huset og det blir mer og mer spent. Kayleigh får vite at venninnen hennes Loren har kysset eksen hennes Adam, og når to ekser kommer samtidig får vi se et velkjent ansikt.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Fem ekser befinner seg i villaen og alle er på tuppa etter at Gaz fra Geordie Shore kom dit. Gary prøver seg på Anita og de faller for hverandre, men eksen som knuste hjertet hennes, dukker opp av havet. Imens har Adam en helt forferdelig dag.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Joes ankomst sjokkerer alle og Anita blir helt ødelagt. Kayleigh lager drama og forteller Joe at Anita har rotet med to av guttene. Neste eks er et velkjent ansikt som kan ødelegge for Gaz og Anita. Velkommen Charlotte!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Jess får høre at Rogan har kysset Megan og hevner seg ved å kysse bestekompisen hans, Morgan. Bromansen ligger på is og villaen er på smeltepunktet. Imens har Adam gått til Charlotte, og hun og Kayleigh krangler, voldsomt.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Opp av sjøen kommer et kjent fjes, Ash fra Ex on the Beach første sesong, og han har bare én ting i hodet: Kaos. Alle jentene liker ham, guttene frykter ham. Når Ash velger Anita til privatfesten, bryter helvetet løs og Gary blir helt vill!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Det er nesten over, og noen ekser slutter fred, mens andre aldri vil se hverandre igjen. Gruppen nyter en bankettmiddag, og Anitas utblåsning avslutter alle utblåsninger. Det blir en siste tur på stranden. Hvem er klar for et siste sjokk?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Welcome to Ex on the Beach
programme.desc: 10 reality- og sosiale media-kjendiser tror de er på en sexy heisatur, men paradiset blir et mareritt når deres ekser begynner å dukke opp fra stranden for å ødelgge hyggestunden. Tennes det gamle flammer eller åpnes det gamle sår?
programme.sub-title: Welcome to Ex on the Beach

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Exed Out
programme.desc: En ny eks ankommer med en hemmelighet som ryster hele huset. En av eksene blir stemt av stranda. Par (og tidligere par) møter sine verste mareritt når de må inn i Hemmelighetenes hytte.

programme.title: iCarly: Fektedrama
programme.desc: Freddie trenger litt guttetid, så han slår seg sammen med Spencer for å dra og fekte. Freddie er et naturtalent, men ting blir innviklet når Spencer får ham med i en kamp mot den utrolige Doug Toder.

programme.title: iCarly: Vinn en date
programme.desc: Når vennen deres Gibby er for sjenert for å be ut jenta han liker, bestemmer gjengen seg for å gjøre ham og hans flamme til deltagere i et "iWin A Date" innslag på nettvideoshowet deres

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg så han først
programme.desc: Når Carly og Sam viser interesse for den samme fyren, lover de at han ikke skal komme imellom dem. Men det er vanskelig, og når de slåss om hans oppmerksomhet, blir vennskapet deres satt på prøve.

programme.title: iCarly: Pack rat
programme.desc: Carly må trå til når Spencer blir avhengig av et videospil. Sam lurer Freddie til å tro at han blir forfulgt av uhell når han nekter å sende et kjedebrev videre.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skylder deg en
programme.desc: Sam blir fornærmet når Freddie beskylder henne for ikke å betale ham og Carly noen av de pengene tilbake som hun konstant låner. Sam prøver iherdig å betale dem tilbake - hun finner seg en ordentlig jobb.

programme.title: iCarly: Hubert Lewbert
programme.desc: En "Lur Lewbert"-sketsj går helt galt og skader Carlys irriterende portvakt. Gjengen pleier ham inntil Freddies mor tar over. Men når kærligheten begynner å blomstre, må de sette en stopper for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Pie
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Spencer tar med Freddie til deres yndlingskonditori, finner de ut at eieren er død. Men enda verre er det at oppskriftene hans kanskje er gått tapt for alltid.

programme.title: iCarly: Jul
programme.desc: I et forsøk på å pifte opp julen med et utradisjonelt tre, kommer Spencer til å sette fyr på alle Carlys gaver. Fortvilet ønsker hun seg at hun hadde en normal bror.

programme.title: iCarly: Kysset
programme.desc: Sam overhører Freddie fortelle Carly at han aldri har kysset en jente, og avslører hemmeligheten hans på netshowet. Gibby og Carly trener Spencer til utttaket for det lokale, profesjonelle fotballaget.

programme.title: iCarly: Bilbråk
programme.desc: Gjengen holder en konkurranse på iCarly, og premien er en ny bil fra en lokal forhandler. Etter at Nevel vinner, oppdager barna at forhandleren ikke visste noe om konkurransen eller bilen de skulle ha donert bort som premie.

programme.title: iCarly: Fred
programme.desc: Freddie sier offentlig at han ikke er fan av internettsensasjonen Fred, noe som får Fred til å meddele at han skal slutte å legge ut filmer for alltid. Fansen blir rasende fordi Freddie har forårsaket slutten på de populære filmene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dobbelt opp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie sniker seg ut for å dra til en MMA-kamp, får de sine dobbeltgjengere til å lure Spencer til å tro at de fortsatt er hjemme. Imens bygger Spencer en kjempeversjon av Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly: Om hva for noe?
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie oppfordrer iCarly-fans til å stemme på David Archuleta i "Amerika Sings", syns de synd på nummer to og hjelper ham med å lage en musikkvideo.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skal gjøre Sam jentete
programme.desc: Da Sam innrømmer at hun liker en gutt på skolen, lærer Carly henne hvordan hun kan lokke ham til seg ved å oppføre seg mere feminint. Spencer er overbevist om at en jente liker ham pga. smokingen hans, så han går med den hele tiden.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 1
programme.desc: Når Carly dater er en tøffing, prøver hun å holde forholdet skjult for Spencer. Og Sam betaler Freddie for å lage en hjemmeside der hun kan legge ut alle sine ekle videofavoritter.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjenforening med Missy
programme.desc: Da Carlys gamle venninne Missy flytter tilbake til Seattle, tror Sam at Missy prøver å skifte henne ut som Carlys bestevenninne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg må ha skap 239
programme.desc: Når Sam og Freddie begge to vinner konkurransen for skolens beste skap, slir de nødt til å dele skap. Carly ber Spencer gi henne timer i billedkunst.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly utdelingen
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie holder en iCarly-galla for de beste bruker-bidragene i iCarly, og hyller pristagerne live på web-showet. Spencer verver europeiske badedraktmodeller for å hjelpe ham å lage premiestatuettene.

programme.title: iCarly: Tvillinger
programme.desc: Freddie prøver å bevise at Melanie, Sams tvillingesøster, er Sam i forkledning. Når Carly underviser Spencers nemesis, Chuck, prøver Spencer å overbevise henne om at Chuck er ond.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 2
programme.desc: Når Carly oppdager at hennes tøffe kjæreste Griffin samler på små Pee Wee Babies, må hun ta stilling til om hun holder ut å date en kar som har en kosedyrsamling. I mens forsøker Spencer å hjelpe Sam med å bli kvitt et mareritt.

programme.title: iCarly: iKamp mot Dingo
programme.desc: Dingo-kanalen har stjålet idéer fra iCarly, så Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer drar til Dingos Studio for å fortelle manusforfatterne hva de mener om det.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg tror de kysset
programme.desc: Da Sam kommer til å avsløre overfor Carly at hun og Freddie smugkysset, konfronterer Carly dem med hvorfor de ikke fortalte henne om det. Og Spencer underviser fanger i billedkunst i fengselet.

programme.title: iCarly: Kokkekamp
programme.desc: Når Carl, Sam og Freddie vinner over en berømt tv-kokk i en matlagningskonkurranse, vil ikke kokken lage mat mer og nekter å komme ut av soverommet sitt. Spencer prøver å oppfylle en fremtidsdrøm.

programme.title: iCarly: Rektor kampen
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie får rektor Franklin sparket, overtar miss Briggs og mr. Howard ledelsen og innfører strenge regler. Og Spencer leier en gammel rodeostjerne til å lære ham å ri på en mekanisk okse.

programme.title: iCarly: iSpeed Date
programme.desc: Så mange gutter dukker opp til 'ta Carly med på fest'-konkurransen, at Carly, Sam og Freddie må benytte speed-dating for å møte dem alle sammen. Spencer følger et merkelig treningsprogram fra en ny app.

programme.title: iCarly: Stjernehjelp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie skal lage en musikkvideo til en popstjernes comeback, oppdager de at popstjernen er ute av form og talentløs. Og Spencer oppdager at kvinnen han dater er Gibbys mor.

programme.title: iCarly: Livredderen
programme.desc: Når Freddie redder livet til Carly, forelsker Carly seg i ham. Sam og Spencer kjemper mot hverandre i et painball-spill som heter Assassin.

programme.title: iCarly: Lewberts tapte kjærlighet
programme.desc: Når gjengen oppdager at Lewbert engang var en lykkelig ung mann som var forlovet med en vakker kvinne, setter de seg fore å gjenforene det adskilte paret.

programme.title: iCarly: Missekonkurransen
programme.desc: Sam avslører overfor Carly og Freddie at hun deltok i skjønnhetskonkurranser som liten. Da hun finner ut at hennes rival skal konkurrere i Seattle, overbeviser hun Carly om å stille opp mot henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: Etter at Sam plutselig må i fengsel, lover Carly og Freddie dyrt og hellig å ikke avlyse nettshowet ettersom faren hennes skal se det. Carly ber Spencer om hjelp, men det blir vanskelig, for han skal på date.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: En eksentrisk millionær ber Carly og vennene hennes om å sende det første nettshowet fra det ytre rom, så de må prøves ut for en romreise. Imens besøker en merkelig liten pike Spencer hjemme i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Freddie flytter ut
programme.desc: Freddie bestemmer seg for å flytte ut av leiligheten sin etter at moren hans har gjort ham flau. Carly, Sam og Freddie starter et firma og spesialiserer seg på bilder av kjæledyr.

programme.title: iCarly: iBeat the Heat
programme.desc: Når en hetebølge rammer Seattle og strømmen går, kommer Spencer til unnsetning med et norsk klimaanlegg.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: De medvirkende introduserer bloopers og bortklipte scener fra serien.

programme.title: iCarly: Rommet brenner
programme.desc: Spencer prøver å overraske Carly på bursdagen hennes, men ender opp med å brenne ned rommet hennes. Men når forsikringsselskapet gir ham en stor sjekk, har han sjansen til å gjøre det godt igjen.

programme.title: iCarly: Ja
programme.desc: Etter at en iCarly fan frir til kjæresten på nettshowet, blir gjengen nesten tvunget til å gå i bryllupet. Men når bruden får kalde føtter, må Carly komme til unnsetning.

programme.title: iCarly: T-skjortesalg
programme.desc: Gjengen begynner å selge Penny-skjorter, og når salget går susende, rekrutterer Sam barn fra 4. klasse for å bidra til å lage t-skjorter. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie er uenige om hvordan de skal behandles.

programme.title: iCarly: Rampestreker
programme.desc: Når hun blir ertet for aldri å ha funnet på en morsom spøk, rekrutterer Carly Spencer for å spøke med Sam og Freddie. Men etter at Spencer har fått sansen for det, kan han ikke slutte. Mob må finne en måte å stoppe ham på.

programme.title: iCarly: Moren til Sam
programme.desc: Etter å ha kranglet ned moren sin, flytter Sam inn til Carly, som snart innser at hun er en fryktelig gjest. Freddie blir forfulgt av en farlig kriminell etter å ha fanget ham på film da han begikk en forbrytelse.

programme.title: Totally Turtles
programme.desc: Cowabunga! Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles kommer rett fra kloakken og er klare til å kjempe mot både fremmede og mutante fiender. Ta en pizza og gjør deg klar for maksimal Turtle Power!
