programme.desc: Vaskebjørner stjeler Beavis og Butt-Heads nachos, og guttene slår tilbake./ Beavis forveksler en fremmed med Butthead, og kan ikke bli kvitt ham.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Bokset inne / Birøktere
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head fanges i en pappeske mens de prøver å gjemme seg på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å sanke honning fra et vepsebol.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday
programme.desc: The show parodies Leave It to Beaver / The duo needs to go to a hospital / Beavis cries and is mocked unrelentlessly / Highland experiences a toxic gas leak
programme.sub-title: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bathroom Break / The Rat
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head decide to devote as much of their time at work as possible to bathroom breaks. / A fool and his nachos are soon parted... by a rat? A rat takes up residence and they stop at nothing.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head take woodworking class / Stevensons get a sattelite dish / An unopened can puts our duo to new adventures / Beavis and Butt-Head form a band called Metallica
programme.sub-title: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Buy Beer / Just For Girls
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get drunk off non-alcoholic beer and fail a sobriety test. / Beavis and Butt-head are allowed to watch a film for girls about teen pregnancy. The titillation ends abruptly during the birthing sequence.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head crash a wedding in hopes of making out with the bride. / Beavis and Butt-head find a dead animal and try to sell its fur. But Beavis soon becomes attached to the lifeless creature.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Det farligste spillet / Beinjegerne
programme.desc: For å hindre den andre i å legge hånden i en bolle varmtvann så man tisser i buksa, holder guttene seg våkne i flere dager./ Beavis og Butt-Head bygger et dinosaurskjelett av bein fra en BBQ.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head become ace bounty hunters after a chance meeting with a reality TV. / With a big test looming, our favorite idiots receive an education in cheating. / Beavis and Butt-Head find themselves trapped in an elevator with a smokin hot chick
programme.sub-title: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Oil Change / Whiplash
programme.desc: After being instructed to change the oil in the fryer at Burger World, Beavis and Butt-head get the oil from a local gas station. / In an attempt to collect some big insurance money, Butt-head tries to give Beavis a whiplash injury while riding the school

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Candy Sale / To the Rescue
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head sell chocalate bars for their school. Well, the chocolate bars practically sell themselves. / Beavis and Butt-head witness a plane crash and appear in a cheesy reenactment on "Rescue 911."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery
programme.desc: The school closes and makes the best day / Butt-Head phones in a mail-order bride / Burger World launches a home delivery service
programme.sub-title: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Stewart is Missing / Yard Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Stevenson shows up at Butt-head's house, desperate to enlist their help in finding Stewart. / Tom Anderson get Beavis and Butt-head to watch his yard sale, and the boys manage to sell everything when they take the sale inside.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Tainted Meat / Bad Dog
programme.desc: Beavis and his bacteria ridden "thingy" contaminate the food at Burger World. / Beavis and Butt-head adopt a vicious dog at a shelter and it trains them.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Crisis line / Career day
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head set out to support callers on a crisis line / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: An evening of trick-or-treating takes a strange turn when Beavis becomes the Great Cornholio.
programme.sub-title: Bungholio: Lord of The Harvest (aka Halloween Special)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Wall Of Youth / Rabies Scare
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head get to express their innermost feeling in a special art exhibit. / Beavis becomes rabid.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Pool Toys / Beavis & Butt-Head's Island
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head help Mr. Anderson build an in-ground swimming pool. / "Beavis and Butt-head get stranded on their own island, while in search of cool chicks, like Ginger.BALL BREAKERS: Just how DO you crack open a bowling ball?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Substitute / Shopping List
programme.desc: A substitute teacher tries unconventional methods to reach Beavis and Butt-head. / Tom Anderson sends Beavis and Butt-head to the store to pick up a few items. They don't do a very good job.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Holy Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head is really screwed when a visit to the hospital once again awakens The Great Cornoholio in Beavis. But two rooms over, the leader of a cult has died. Is the Great Cornholio destined to be the cult's idiot savior?

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bedpans & Broomsticks / Yogurt's Cool (aka Try Yogurt)
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head pay off a debt to society by doing community service work in a hospital. / A suggestive commercial convinces Beavis & Butt-head it's time to try frozen yogurt.
programme.sub-title: Bedpans & Broomsticks / Yogurt's Cool (aka Try Yogurt)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head come to the aid of a wounded baby bird...almost. / Beavis and Butt-head show up at an AA meeting hoping to score some booze.
programme.sub-title: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nektet service / Balleskvis
programme.desc: Beavis prøver yogabukser og får dem ikke av. / Guttene oppdager at de har rett til å nekte service til kunder på Burger World.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to stay awake all night, in an attempt to discover the secret behind morning wood. / For his oral report on an historical figure, Beavis recounts the valuable lessons he learned one night while eating at Burger World.
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: En spirituell reise
programme.desc: Beavis ser ansiktet til Jesus i en nacho-chips. Det sender ham på en episk reise for å finne svar på det store spørsmålet - "Hvorfor får jeg aldri pult?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Nose Bleed / Vaya Con Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head tries some sadistic home remedies in an attempt to stop Beavis's nosebleed. / When Beavis turns into Cornholio in Burger World, Immigration Officials take him in as a possible illegal alien and try to make sense of his gibberish.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: I've Heard Rumors...
programme.desc: Etter en effektiv forvandling, har både Kelli og Juy viktige beskjeder. En veteran tar plutselig et følelsesladd farvel.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: You Are Wasting Our Time!
programme.desc: En veterans sjokkerende sorti gjør at Kelli og Judy må fatte sesongens tøfefste avgjørelse.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Everyone Needs A Dream
programme.desc: Det endelige, fulle laget offentliggjøres og Kelli tar det til kampdagens press. Inludert en helt ny opptreden.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 1
programme.desc: Over 600 spente og nervøse Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-aspiranter ankommer Texas Stadium for det første uttaket. Når de har danset for dommerne, venter de spent på å få høre hvem som går videre.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: I sluttuttaket er konkurransen beinhard. Nå må de som har overlevd, konkurrere mot erfarne veteraner om en av de ettertraktede plassene på DCCs treningsleir.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: Treningsleiren er i gang! De nye kandidatene er spente, og kanskje fulle av beundring, når de treffer veteranene for første gang på Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: Etter bare to uker på treningsleiren må noen elimineres. Men først skal jentene prøve draktene. Det er et bittersøtt øyeblikk for nykommerne siden de ennå ikke har gjort seg fortjent til dem.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: Etter å ha tatt farvel med en av sine egne, forstår de resterende treningsleir-kandidatene at ingens posisjon på troppen er sikker. Kitty Carter blir bedt om å jobbe med de svakeste jentene og piske dem i form.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Hele troppen trenger en oppvekker og det skal de få av gjestekoreograf Kitty Carter. Hun leder gruppen gjennom en knallhard danseøvelse som gjør noen av jentene til emosjonelle vrak. Så er det tid for en leksjon i DCCs etikette.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: Noen drømmer går i oppfyllelse når de gjenværende heldige treningsleir-kandidatene står modell i den ikoniske Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-drakten under en sexy fotoseanse.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: Flere kan miste plassen på laget, og det er bare to øvelser igjen. Jentene drar på seg de berømte hvite cowboy-støvlene for første gang. Så skal Judy og Megan Fox bedømme deres endelige danserutiner.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 1
programme.desc: Seks hundre nervøse og spente Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader-aspiranter ankommer et hotell til de første uttakene. Hver deltaker får mindre enn to minutter på seg til å utføre en freestyle-danserutine foran dommerne.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: I det endelige uttaket er det bare de sterkeste som overlever. DCC-aspirantene må nå konkurrere mot veteranene om en plass på treningsleiren.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: Hvis kandidatene trodde at uttaket var tøft, får de seg en overraskelse når den brutale treningsleiren sparkes i gang. Uke 1 på Valley Ranch starter med at jentene finner ut hva dommerne hadde å si om dem.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: Det er bare den tredje uken av treningsleiren, men det er allerede tid for å gjøre kutt. Hvem vil overleve? Uken starter med tilpassing av drakten der også aspirantene får prøve på det berømte blå og hvite antrekket.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: DCC-"looken" - rett hår eller krøller? Blond eller rødhåret? Jentene aner ikke hva Kelli og salongdirektøren Rainer Schneck har planlagt for dem når de får sine dramatiske Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders- makeovers.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Når DCC-direktøren Kelli Finglass gir en tidligere deltaker en utrolig sjanse til å delta på treningsleiren tre uker etter starten, er det mye å ta igjen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: Hun er tilbake! Den beryktede Kitty Carter kommer til Valley Ranch for å undervise DCCene i teknikk. Deretter skal Charlotte Jones Anderson guide en gruppe cheerleadere på en privat tur rundt Cowboys Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: Kelli og Judy må ta tøffe beslutninger som er rettferdige, men vonde. Det er oppgjørets time for de gjenværende treningsleir-kandidatene, da det bare er to repetisjoner igjen før den siste elimineringen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 1
programme.desc: For første gang er det det praktfulle Cowboys-stadionet i Texas som er basen for Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-uttaket. Over 600 aspiranter med drømmer om å komme på 2010-2011 DCC-laget ankommer før soloppgang for innledningsrunden.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: De 47 nye jentene som skal delta på DCC-finaleuttaket har hatt to uker til å forberede seg, men er de klare til å danse sammen med de 27 tilbakevendende DCC-veteranene?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: DCC Training Camp begynner i kveld! Treningsleir-kandidatene ankommer Valley Ranch for første gang og får muligheten til å møte sine idoler og mentorer - DCC-veteranene.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: I den andre uken av treningsleiren vil noen av aspirantene bli sendt hjem. Noen få utvalgte veteraner skal filme et segment for Good Morning America, og de hjelper til med å virkeliggjøre en livslang drøm for en heldig dame.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: Uke fire av treningsleiren begynner med at nykommerne får en DCC-"makeover". Fra hår og sminke til selvbruning og tannbleking, blir aspirantene forvandlet til DCC-representanter.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Slutten på treningsleiren nærmer seg og DCC-portretter står på planen. Treningsleir-aspirantene og -veteranene er klare for sine nærbilder, kledd i spesialsydde DCC-drakter og med feilfritt hår og sminke.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: 2010 Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-troppen skal kunngjøres i løpet av de neste to dagene. Det sier seg selv at det er en stressende tid for treningsleir-aspirantene. Tiden er inne for å imponere.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: 34 nykommere og veteraner møter opp i drakten for å ta gruppebildet. Men gledens dag dempes av at direktøren og koreografen til Dallas Cowboy Cheerleaders ennå ikke har offisielt kunngjort 2010-troppen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Prøvedansingen begynner
programme.desc: Cowboys stadion i Arlington i Texas blir nok en gang stedet for prøvedansingen til Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders. 500 kandidater drømmer om å komme med i DCC-kvalifiseringen 2011-2012 DCC før soloppgang.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: På banen
programme.desc: Det storslagne Cowboys stadion er stedet for DCCs avsluttende prøvedansing. Presset blir høyt for 69 nye jenter når 18 DCC-veteraner deltar i den ettertraktede invitasjonen til treningsleiren.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105
programme.desc: Tina Jørgensen forsvant etter en kveld på byen i Stavanger. En måned senere finner politiet liket av en 20 år gammel kvinne. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av Tina og deretter dumpet henne langs en øde veistrekning?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 301
programme.desc: Justisminister Tor Mikkel Wara blir i 2018 utsatt for en rekke alvorlige angrep på sitt private hjem. I flere måneder står politiet uten spor, helt til det kommer et sjokkerende gjennombrudd i saken.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 404
programme.desc: I desember 2015 gjør gallerist Reidar Osen et ærend med varebilen sin da han blir kapret av ukjente gjerningsmenn, som truer ham på livet og krever to millioner kroner. Hvem står bak kidnappingen?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 102
programme.desc: Åtte år gamle Monika Sviglinskaja blir funnet død i sitt hjem på Sotra. Politiet mener det dreier seg om et selvmord og henlegger saken. Men moren hennes er fortsatt overbevist om at noe kriminelt har skjedd.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En politietterforskning settes i gang etter at Maud Johansson meldes savnet den 18. oktober 2005. Etter flere år med iherdig leting ser det ut til at etterforskningen stopper opp, men politiet gir ikke opp.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 704
programme.desc: En sommernatt i Värmland bryter det ut slagsmål, hvoretter 21 år gamle Harout mottar et dødelig knivstikk. Politiet får mistanker om at et sjalusidrama kan være nøkkelen til å finne den skyldige.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 504
programme.desc: En sommernatt i 2001 er Gunn Merete Lode på vei hjem etter et venninnetreff i Bryne. I nabolaget sitt blir hun overfalt av en ukjent mann. Situasjonen bli observert av 17 år gamle Øyvind.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 702
programme.desc: Ekteparet Suzanne og Lars lever et stille og rolig liv på landet utenfor Stockholm. Men når Suzanne avlyser en viktig tenniskamp på kort varsel, blir hennes tennispartner mistenksom og varsler politiet.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Da 32 år gamle Memo plutselig forsvinner, tar vennene hans saken i egne hender og begynner å lete desperat etter ham. Bekymringen forvandles til frykt når letingen fører til urovekkende oppdagelser.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Natt til 13. februar 2023 rystes den lille bygda Malå i Nord-Sverige av et brutalt angrep. Etter hvert som politiet begynner å nøste opp i saken, dukker det opp mørke hemmeligheter og mistanker mot uventede personer.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 304
programme.desc: I august 2004 stormer to bevæpnede personer inn i Munch-museet på Tøyen. I kaoset som oppstår tar de med seg de to verdenskjente maleriene Skrik og Madonna. Hvem står bak tyveriet, og er bildene tapt for alltid?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 706
programme.desc: I mai 2017 ble småbarnsfaren Filip Viking funnet skutt i Katrineholm. Vitner skynder seg bort til ham og i forbindelse med forsøkene på å redde Filips liv, klarer de å se en lang svartkledd mann løpe fra åstedet.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 405
programme.desc: To reindriftsutøvere fra Vest Finnmark havner i politiets søkelys etter å ha innrapportert flere hundre rovdyrskadde reinsdyr. Kan det virkelig være slik at de to har mishandlet dyrene sine for å motta erstatning?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: I juli 2022 rystes Mölndal da en død mann blir funnet halvt avkledd, brennemerket og med en båndopptaker plassert på kroppen. Politiet mistenker at noe langt mer urovekkende enn et vanlig drap har funnet sted.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 201
programme.desc: En augustdag i 1996 blir den 20 år gamle hotellarbeideren Trude Espås observert sittende på en stein ikke langt unna Geiranger sentrum. 11 dager senere blir hun funnet drept.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 203
programme.desc: Den tidligere artisten, flammeslukeren og TV-danseren Julio Kopseng lever et omsvermet liv i Oslos dansemiljø. Da han blir anmeldt for en voldtekt i 2013 utløses et skred av voldtektsanmeldelser mot ham.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 104
programme.desc: 10. august 2019 opplevde Norge nok et rystende terrorangrep. 21 år gamle Philip Manshaus dreper først sin 17 år gamle stesøster. Bevæpnet, og med uniform går han deretter til angrep mot Al-Noor moskeen i Bærum.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 101
programme.desc: Anne Elisabeth Hagen forsvinner sporløst fra sitt hjem høsten 2018. På en rød stol finner ektemann og milliardær, Tom Hagen et trusselbrev og krav om løsepenger.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Den 15. mai 2018 ble politiet i Örebro varslet om at Lena Wesström, en trebarnsmor, var forsvunnet fra hjemmet sitt. Et vitne hevder å ha hørt hjerteskjærende skrik fra en kvinne samme natt som Lena forsvant.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 202
programme.desc: Tidlig en søndag morgen i 2004 er den 22 år gamle sykepleierstudenten Anne Slåtten på vei til jobb, men hun dukker aldri opp. Etter et døgn blir hun funnet drept i. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av den omsorgsfulle jenta?

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: A Lack of Vision, Wound Up Rottie, Attack of the Peek-a-Poo
programme.desc: Cody, a blind Yorkshire terrier, is overly protective. Rottweiler Buffy has a dangerous obsession with the horses. Peek-a-Poo puppy Chloe, growls, snaps, and bites to get her way.
programme.sub-title: A Lack of Vision, Wound Up Rottie, Attack of the Peek-a-Poo

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Beagle Mania, Rescue Me… Rescue You
programme.desc: At six years old, beagle Gizmo has become very aggressive. Jennifer Lee Pryor runs Pryor’s Planet, a rescue organization to honor her late husband, comedian Richard Pryor.
programme.sub-title: Beagle Mania, Rescue Me… Rescue You

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Nightmare in Central Park, Bad Boy Baxter
programme.desc: Curly, an adopted lab-greyhound mix, is aggressive with other dogs. Rhodesian Ridgeback/Boxer mix Baxter is rescued after wandering the streets but has severe dog aggression.
programme.sub-title: Nightmare in Central Park, Bad Boy Baxter

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Lives Changed
programme.desc: In this special episode, Cesar revisits some of the incredible Dog Whisperer stories of the past four years and shares his reactions to the changes in the lives of these special packs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Wicked Dog, The Gospel According to Cesar, Cry Baby
programme.desc: Wicked star Eden Espinosa’s Yorkshire Terrier, Owen, is creating drama. The Redemptorist brothers at Holy Redeemer College in Washington, D.C. needed a guard dog. Rocky, a rescue, can’t stop crying.
programme.sub-title: Wicked Dog, The Gospel According to Cesar, Cry Baby

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Made in Japan, Lawnmower Licker
programme.desc: Marley, a neglected Shiba Inu from Japan, develops aggression towards dogs and people. Piper, a Wire Fox Terrier obsessively tries to get to and lick the lawnmower engine.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Doubt of a Shadow
programme.desc: Newly adopted Shadow starts to exhibit aggressive tendencies towards his family. A professional dog walker needs help with several of her clients.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Anti-Social Sasha
programme.desc: Sasha, a pound pup, is perfect in the house, but outside she shows aggression towards other dogs. Angler, a Lab, is blind, and exhibits strange behavior around food.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bullying Bulldog
programme.desc: Bulldog Buster is prone to biting and growling. Sadie, a 3 month old Beagle/terrier mix, is frightened of trash cans. Lacey develops anxiety at 11 years of age.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy: Red Alert
programme.desc: Pit Bull Buddy, was found chained and starving to death and was very aggressive. Rufus, a Rottweiler/Shar Pei mix, has bitten five people. Both need to get their aggression under control.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: The Dark Side of Chipper
programme.desc: Chipper, a 2-month old Ridgeback/Boxer mix has become progressively more aggressive and has attacked 5 dogs. Two Whippets, Rudy and Monte, are causing issues at their owner’s place of business.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: A pet groomer gets rave reviews but needs Cesar's help with handling some difficult clients. A Chihuahua makes a lot of noise, causing chaos with her cohabiters. Can Cesar install calm in the pack?

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Nuna & Kane
programme.desc: NuNu the Chihuahua, fiercely attacks anyone who comes near his owner Tina. NuNu’s total opposite, Kane the Great Dane, is vehemently afraid of shiny surfaces

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Opie & Flirt
programme.desc: Black lab mix Opie is a charmer around people, but frighteningly aggressive around other dogs. Energetic to the point of being neurotic, Chinese Crested Flirt cannot sit still for one moment.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Rana & Ruby
programme.desc: Scared of everything, Ruby the Vischla deals with her neuroses by biting. At the same time, Rana barks every time bread pops in the toaster, or when the microwave goes off, or when the phone rings.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Josh & Boomer
programme.desc: Josh, a Maltese, will not let anyone with a brush or pair of scissors near him without putting up a fight. Boomer, a Chesapeake Bay Retriever, barks incessantly and refuses to come out of the pool.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Harry & Brooks
programme.desc: Harry wants to charge after anything with wheels, including passing cyclists, rollerbladers or skateboarders. Brooks, an Entlebucher, is constantly chasing after light, he is never calm.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Coach & Sueki
programme.desc: Coach, an out of control Boxer, bit a neighbor, seemingly sealing his fate. Coach gets a stay of execution when Cesar Millan comes to the rescue. Sueki refuses to walk on the leash.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Slick & Pepper
programme.desc: Slick, a rare white Puli, is full of phobias. When clients come to Christopher’s photography studio, they are greeted by Pepper’s annoying barking and heel nipping.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Ava & Gus
programme.desc: Ava, a Pug/Pekingese swiftly twirls for all occasions, possibly a neurological condition Cesar cannot treat. Gus the Bouvier greets people by throwing his 100 pound body at them.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Maya & Churchill
programme.desc: Churchill the Rottweiler is a well mannered dog, except when around other animals. Meanwhile, Maya, an affable Pit Bull, insists on being intimately involved in all operations of the household.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bubba & Garrett
programme.desc: Heidi Wasserman inherited Bubba, a spoiled Maltese that demands to be taken everywhere and nips at anyone who tries to leave. Garrett, a German Shepherd, chases his tail, obsessively.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful attorney seduces Catherine's boss, Joe Maxwell, creating a serious conflict of interest.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Promises of Someday
programme.desc: Catherine is disturbed when she begins to suspect the new attorney in her office is a fraud... and more disturbed when she finds him looking for the entrance to Vincent's world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Down to a Sunless Sea
programme.desc: Catherine fails to heed Vincent's warnings about her dangerous former law-school beau.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Fever
programme.desc: After Mouse discovers a ship's gold and gemstones treasure buried beneath the city, Vincent's community is torn apart by greed and strife.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Everything is Everything
programme.desc: A Romani boy clears his father's name and regains the love and trust of his grandparents with Vincent and Catherine's help.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: To Reign in Hell
programme.desc: Vincent prepares for a battle to the death after Catherine is kidnapped by a giant warrior.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ozymandias
programme.desc: Vincent's world Below is threatened by a massive tower being built by Elliot Burch, a former suitor of Catherine's. She agrees to marry Burch on the condition that he halt construction.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Happy Life
programme.desc: Catherine and Vincent are forced to question if they could ever be truly happy together.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Chamber Music
programme.desc: While walking in the world Above, Vincent recognizes Rolly,a teenage musical prodigy and ex-tunnel dweller who is now a junkie.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Remember Love
programme.desc: In a moment of profound despair, Vincent undergoes his own It's a Wonderful Life (1946) experience and sees what would have happened if he had died as a baby.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ashes, Ashes
programme.desc: A Russian sailor escapes to the tunnels only to bring a plague upon the people in the Underworld. It is up to Catherine, Vincent, Father, and everybody to help save their world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: When the tunnel world is having an annual event, Paracelcus makes plans to crash the event and do something.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: God Bless the Child
programme.desc: With Catherine's help, a pregnant teenage hooker is welcomed into the tunnels. Complications arise when she falls in love with Vincent.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: A deaf girl, who used to live below, falls in with a street gang that threatens to put an end to her first serious love affair.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Fair and Perfect Knight
programme.desc: Catherine befriends a boy from the world below who leaves the tunnels to go college.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Labyrinths
programme.desc: A young man gets lost in the tunnel world and he is found by the inhabitants. They're uncertain if they should let him go because they're not sure if he can be trusted to keep their secret.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Brothers
programme.desc: Vincent's "brother" Devin returns with Charles, a hideously deformed man seeking sanctuary.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Examination Day/A Message From Charity
programme.desc: In the far future, twelve-year-old Dickie must take the government intelligence test/A 16-year old in 1985 finds himself in telepathic contact with a girl in 1700. Her knowledge of the future gets her accused of being a witch.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Four of Us are Dying
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.
programme.sub-title: The Four of Us are Dying

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Third From the Sun
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Shot an Arrow into the Air
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately, they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.
programme.sub-title: I Shot an Arrow into the Air

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hitch-Hiker
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Teacher's Aide/Paladin of the Lost Hour
programme.desc: A teacher on a violent and gang-infested high school has trouble controlling her students/A Vietnam vet named Billy saves an old man named Gaspar from a mugging at a cemetery.
programme.sub-title: Teacher's Aide/Paladin of the Lost Hour

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Act Break/The Burning Man/Dealer's Choice
programme.desc: Landlord pesters Maury, whose partner dies. Maury wishes for Shakespeare as partner, travels back in time/Woman encounters odd hitchhiker/Poker game newcomer raises suspicion with repeated card draws.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Fever
programme.desc: Tight-fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Flight
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. airbase in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Purple Testament
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Elegy
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Wong's Lost and Found Emporium
programme.desc: David Wong searches for something he lost. He seeks the Lost and Found Emporium where he finds others looking for their lost items.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dead Woman's Shoes
programme.desc: Shy Maddie finds a pair of shoes and after trying them on is possessed by the vengeful spirit of a rich murdered woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Shadow Man/The Uncle Devil Show/Opening Day
programme.desc: Boy finds solace in deal with Shadow Man/Video tricks bewilder parents/Lovers plot in Twilight Zone, facing ironic twist.
programme.sub-title: The Shadow Man/The Uncle Devil Show/Opening Day

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mirror Image
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Monsters are Due on Maple Street
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.
programme.sub-title: The Monsters are Due on Maple Street

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A World of Difference
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Long Live Walter Jameson
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Beacon/One Life, Furnished in Early Poverty
programme.desc: Physician stranded in wary village/Gus Rosenthal revisits past, meets younger self. Guiding him, Gus realizes mistakes.
programme.sub-title: The Beacon/One Life, Furnished in Early Poverty

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Night of the Meek/But Can She Type?/The Star
programme.desc: Store Santa redefines Christmas for owner/Secretary finds alternate universe revering her job/Starship discovers Bethlehem's star and ancient civilization's remains.
programme.sub-title: Night of the Meek/But Can She Type?/The Star

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: People Are Alike All Over
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Execution
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Big Tall Wish
programme.desc: An over-the-hill boxer gets a boost from one of his biggest fans - a little boy with an unwavering belief in magic.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Nice Place to Visit
programme.desc: After being shot to death, Rocky Valentine encounters the amiable white-haired Mr. Pip, who gives Rocky everything he wishes for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Still Life/The Little People of Killany Woods/The Misfortune Cookie
programme.desc: Dan finds mystic photos in antique camera/Irishman's leprechaun tales turn real/Critic's end foretold by fortune cookies.
programme.sub-title: Still Life/The Little People of Killany Woods/The Misfortune Cookie

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Monsters!/A Small Talent for War/A Matter of Minutes
programme.desc: Young monster fan meets alleged vampire neighbor/Alien threatens humanity, nations rush disarmament/Couple finds empty street with strange workers.
programme.sub-title: Monsters!/A Small Talent for War/A Matter of Minutes

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Salem The Boy
programme.desc: Salem's return to human form is short-lived, thanks to Roland the Troll and Sabrina's unknowing wishes.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Teenage Writer
programme.desc: When typed on a magical typewriter, Sabrina’s spy story and its characters come to life.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Big Sleep
programme.desc: A vengeful aunt uses magic poppies to put the Spellman household to sleep.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Pen Pal
programme.desc: Sabrina discovers her new pen pal witch is wanted in two realms.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Real World
programme.desc: Sabrina becomes the unknowing star of an Other Realm TV show.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Long and Winding Short Cut
programme.desc: Sabrina is stripped of modern conveniences after using shortcuts to solve her family secret.
programme.sub-title: The Long and Winding Short Cut

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Sandman
programme.desc: Employed as a Sandman, Sabrina gets into trouble dropping into other people’s dreams.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Silent Movie
programme.desc: The Spellman house becomes the setting for a silent movie.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Good The Bad And The Luau (Season Finale)
programme.desc: Sabrina and her aunts travel to Hawaii for a family reunion, but when they arrive, Sabrina discovers that she will not be able to enjoy herself until she solves the family secret once and for all.
programme.sub-title: The Good The Bad And The Luau (Season Finale)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: No Place Like Home (Season Premiere)
programme.desc: Sabrina’s senior year of high school gets off to a rocky start.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dream A Little Dreama Me
programme.desc: Her Witches License and a new student bring Sabrina a new set of challenges.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Jealousy

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Little Orphan Hilda
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda experience a life-changing event when they discover they are adopted.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Spoiled Rotten
programme.desc: New charge card from the Other Realm causes Sabrina to forget that the most important things in life can’t be bought.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Phantom Menace
programme.desc: It’s Halloween, and Sabrina is having a ghoulish time adjusting to her new job at the coffee house.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Prelude To A Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina’s new coffeehouse co-worker poses a threat to her relationship with Harvey.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Aging Not So Gracefully
programme.desc: Sabrina goes a little overboard in her attempt to seem more mature for the attentions of a college boy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Love Means Having To Say You’re Sorry

programme.sub-title: Love Means Having To Say You’re Sorry

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Ice Station Sabrina
programme.desc: A life-threatening situation forces Sabrina to risk exposing her magic to a witch hunter.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Salem And Juliette
programme.desc: Sabrina helps Salem find a date for his high school reunion.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Nipping At Your Nose
programme.desc: When the weather outside turns frightful, the Spellman’s plan a trip to Jamaica.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Now You See Her Now You Don’t
programme.desc: Adhering to a fad diet from the Other Realm, Sabrina becomes so thin she literally disappears.
programme.sub-title: Now You See Her Now You Don’t

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Super Hero
programme.desc: Childhood dreams come true when Sabrina casts a spell that turns Harvey into a superhero.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Love In Bloom
programme.desc: Valentine’s Day gets complicated when Sabrina learns two boys are vying for her heart.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Welcome Back Duke
programme.desc: Sabrina discovers why the road to ruin is paved with good intentions.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Salem’s Daughter
programme.desc: As maid of honor, Sabrina pays the price for reuniting Salem with his daughter in time for her wedding.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dreama, The Mouse
programme.desc: Brad’s witch hunting gene goes into overdrive when Sabrina comes down with Spring Fever.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Wild Wild Witch
programme.desc: The West gets even wilder when Sabrina takes the reins as town sheriff.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: She’s Baaack!
programme.desc: Cousin Amanda returns to give Sabrina a little competition in the teenage witch -and love-- department.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Four Faces Of Sabrina
programme.desc: Choosing a college literally tears Sabrina apart when she tries too hard to make everyone happy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)
programme.desc: After four years of enduring Sabrina’s spells and strange behavior, Harvey finally suspects she is a witch
programme.sub-title: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Every Witch Way but Loose
programme.desc: After spending the summer trying to get over her first love, Sabrina decides to make some changes in her life, including attending college and living away from home like a normal freshman.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Double Time
programme.desc: In order to keep up with the overwhelming academic and social demands of college life, Sabrina puts herself under a complicated time spell to move at lightning speed, but she later discovers that the extra time got sucked away from her roommates.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Heart of the Matter
programme.desc: When Sabrina realizes she has been turning down guys right and left since her break up with Harvey, she casts a spell to turn herself into a dating machine.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: You Can’t Twin
programme.desc: On a visit to the Other Realm, Sabrina meets up with her evil twin Katrina who steals her passport and returns to mortal life posing as Sabrina.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: House of PI’s
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are unexpectedly paired together to write a story in an effort to land a coveted spot on the school newspaper.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Halloween Scene
programme.desc: When Sabrina can’t find anyone to share her enthusiasm for Halloween she decides to throw her own haunted holiday bash and it turns into the party of the year.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Welcome Traveler
programme.desc: When Sabrina tries to pull Miles away from his latest conspiracy theory and into some semblance of a social life, she unknowingly pushes him right into the hands of a cult whose eccentric leader claims to be a witch.

programme.title: Fem i familien: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: When a blizzard forces the Keatons to spend Christmas at home, Elyse's gift to Steven an album filled with fascinating old photos sparks flashbacks to the births of their three children.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Sherry Baby
programme.desc: When popular sorority girl Sherry Marshall befriends Mallory to get close to Alex, Mallory brings them together in hopes of joining Pi Nu but her plan backfires.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Fugitive, Part 1
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Fugitive, Part 2
programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Margin Of Error
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Fem i familien: French Lessons
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Fem i familien: I Gotta Be Ming
programme.desc: As Big Brother to a 10-year-old Vietnamese boy, Alex tries to mold Ming into his own image, and he learns an unforgettable lesson when he breaks a promise to the adoring child.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Stage Fright
programme.desc: While gearing up to face the television cameras as captain of his high school's team on "Quiz-Em", Alex panics at first when a teammate drops out and then launches a tutoring program a la Eliza Doolittle for his sister Mallory.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Fifth Wheel
programme.desc: Alex gets stuck babysitting for his little sister Jennifer, who is fed up with feeling in the way at his poker game and decides to disappear.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Tender is the Knight
programme.desc: When pretty Carrie Newman and her mother Julia come to visit the Keatons, Carrie's forward behavior sends Alex into a panic.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Homecoming
programme.desc: When Mallory's boyfriend Jeff arrives home from college and wants to go steady, she's elated, but it's soon apparent that he's a little awed by the school and merely grasping at the familiar.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Alex anxiously awaits a crucial college recommendation from his English teacher.

programme.title: Fem i familien: To Snatch a Keith
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse realize how lucky they are when their friends come over for a visit, but are unaware that it will be for the last time.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Speed Trap
programme.desc: When Alex takes diet pills for a lift during midterms, his dependency level increases daily.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Batter Up
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse worry that Jennifer's softball team coach is pushing the girls too hard.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Not An Affair to Remember
programme.desc: Steven's assistant at the station is bright, talented, funny, and witty...and in love with him.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Working At It
programme.desc: Elyse feels the need to expand her horizons.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Sweet Lorraine
programme.desc: While working as a DJ at the school radio station, Alex strikes up a telephone friendship with caller Lorraine Ferrar.

programme.title: Fem i familien: This Year's Model
programme.desc: Mallory secretly submits a picture of Elyse and herself to an ad agency for a mother-daughter-modeling contest.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Birthday Boy
programme.desc: On his 18th birthday, Alex defies his mother and goes off with some of his buddies to celebrate at an out-of-town nightclub.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Diary of a Young Girl
programme.desc: In the hospital awaiting a tonsillectomy, Jennifer fears she may never see her family again.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Anniversary Waltz
programme.desc: For their 20th anniversary, Steven wants a small gathering, but Elyse wants a big party. Everything goes wrong, leading to constant arguing - with the kids worrying how things might end.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Go Tigers
programme.desc: Alex is both amazed and furious when a critical admissions interview at Princeton University is shattered by his hysterical sister Mallory.

programme.title: Fem i familien: A Keaton Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A cynical Alex finds the spirit of Christmas in a dream.

programme.title: Fem i familien: 'M' Is For the Many Things
programme.desc: Elyse is shocked by her soon-to-be-divorced mother's quick and free-spirited plunge into the singles world.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Say Uncle
programme.desc: Alex discovers that his idol, young Uncle Ned, has a serious drinking problem.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Ladies Man
programme.desc: Alex pretends to support the Equal Rights Amendment to impress a pretty feminist.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Ready Or Not
programme.desc: Mallory turns to Alex for some advice when she begins to fear she'll lose her new boyfriend unless she agrees to his pleas for a more "adult" romance.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Lady Sings the Blues
programme.desc: Elyse is excited at the prospect of reviving her folk-singing career at a local nightclub.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Graduate
programme.desc: Alex is so sure that he will be named valedictorian of his class that he can't cope with the thought of being defeated by a girl-especially his girl.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Double Date
programme.desc: Alex courts disaster when he invites two dates to the senior prom. He devises an elaborate scheme for escorting each of the unknowing girls on a night to remember.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Baby Boy Doe
programme.desc: When Alex's pal Skippy discovers he's adopted, Alex helps him cope with the shocking news.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Gambler
programme.desc: When Elyse has a convention speech in 'fascinating east coast resort' Atlantic City, she didn't plan to waste any time and money gambling.

programme.title: JAG: Return of Mimmy Blackhorse
programme.desc: An Army forensic pathologist joins forces with Harm, Mac, Bud and Harriet as they try to verify that newly unearthed human remains are those of a heroic Navajo "code-talker" who had been missing since WWII.

programme.title: JAG: The Imposter
programme.desc: Harm is held captive by Palmer, a renegade government agent with whom he had crossed swords a few months ago. While Palmer prepares a life mask so he can pass for Harm, he explains his plans to assassinate the key witness in the trial.

programme.title: JAG: To Russia With Love
programme.desc: With evidence that his missing father could still be alive in, Harm convinces the Admiral to give him time off so he can go to Russia. In Moscow, they are questioned by Mark Falcon, the KGB agent who had stolen a list of POW's earlier from Harm.

programme.title: JAG: Gypsy Eyes
programme.desc: Unable to lose the pursuing Russian fighters, Harm's and Mac’s hijacked Mig is shot out of the sky over Siberia.

programme.title: JAG: Act of Terror
programme.desc: When Arab terrorists attach a mine to a US Navy warship in an attempt to sink it, Marine guards are able to kill one and capture the other, even after the mine explodes, killing two sailors.

programme.title: JAG: The Black Jet
programme.desc: Harm and Mac are sent to Teheran, Iran to represent a Navy flier whose Stealth jet crashed in Iran due to a major mechanical failure.

programme.title: JAG: Silent Service
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are having trouble relating...a result of working together under stress for so long.

programme.title: JAG: King of the Greenie Board
programme.desc: Harm is now a Tomcat division commander aboard the carrier USS Patrick Henry that is patrolling the Mediterranean near Yugoslavia.

programme.title: JAG: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: The Russians are furious over the killing of their peacekeepers and the Navy sends Mac, Brumby, and Roberts to the Patrick Henry to conduct the court-martial of Lt. Buxton.

programme.title: JAG: True Calling
programme.desc: When a petty officer smuggles a pregnant Serbian woman aboard the carrier in order to save her from a vengeful fiancée, he's arrested and scheduled to be court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG: Psychic Warrior
programme.desc: When a Navy research project involving ESP and psychic phenomenon goes awry, resulting in the death of one of the research subjects, the Admiral in charge is court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG: Rogue
programme.desc: As the lowest-ranking lawyer at JAG, Bud is assigned to accompany Raglan, a former Special Forces operative who is hired by the Pentagon to test security at military bases.

programme.title: JAG: Ambush
programme.desc: Capt. Shepard leads his troop off its peacekeeping mission and into battle with the colonel of the rebel forces. Consequently, six marines die in the public incident. Harm is sent in to investigate despite a recent touch of bad luck in a string of trials.

programme.title: JAG: Jag-a-thon
programme.desc: The JAG gang takes part in a JAGathon, a charity-benefit marathon, which provides opportunities for personal pride and individual competitiveness. Sturgis feels uncertain, and Harm defends a sailor for impersonating an officer.

programme.title: JAG: The Mission
programme.desc: A spotter on the ground calls for an airstrike as he has identified 15 heavily armed suspected Al Qaeda members on horseback. JAG won’t approve the airstrike until the spotter is absolutely certain the men are Al Qaeda members.

programme.title: JAG: Defending His Honor
programme.desc: An ambulance pulls up to a crash site where a woman, Jennifer Wilson, is found injured and crying for her baby. Unbeknownst to her, the six-month-old baby died in the accident. A Navy judge stands accused of vehicular homicide.

programme.title: JAG: In Country
programme.desc: Central Command coordinates an airstrike on a confirmed target traveling through Afghanistan. After the strike is launched, marine troops assess the damage and they are disturbed to learn that they targeted the wrong vehicle and hit civilians instead.

programme.title: JAG: Enemy Below
programme.desc: Kabir is preparing an attack against the U.S. and was last seen crossing the border from Afghanistan to Iran. He is believed to have recruited Capt. Yerastov, a Russian submarine captain. Turner, Harm and Mac help in the hunt for the terrorists.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Funny Valentine / The Wallflower / A Home Is Not A Home
programme.desc: Two shy people keep missing each other, due in part to Gopher's interference; two residents of old folks home take a cruise, only to be followed by their meddling children.
programme.sub-title: Funny Valentine / The Wallflower / A Home Is Not A Home

programme.title: The Love Boat: Ages Of Man / Families / Bo 'N Sam
programme.desc: Julie ends up in the middle of an unusual love triangle when the visiting 13-year-old son of the head of the cruise line develops a crush on her at the same time that she is trying to win over a charming older passenger.
programme.sub-title: Ages Of Man / Families / Bo 'N Sam

programme.title: The Love Boat: Sounds Of Silence / Cyrano De Bricker / Murder On The High Seas
programme.desc: A singer tries to persuade his manager to let him abandon the shock tactics that made him famous and let his music speak for itself.
programme.sub-title: Sounds Of Silence / Cyrano De Bricker / Murder On The High Seas

programme.title: The Love Boat: Super Mom / I'll See You Again / April's Return
programme.desc: One-time stowaway April Lopez returns to the ship as a popular singer. However, she grows tired of the hassles of fame and decides that she would like to become a cruise director.
programme.sub-title: Super Mom / I'll See You Again / April's Return

programme.title: The Love Boat: Third Wheel / Grandmother's Day / Second String Mom
programme.desc: Gopher gives his parents a cruise as a Mother's Day present. Gopher's father grows jealous of the close relationship between mother and son.
programme.sub-title: Third Wheel / Grandmother's Day / Second String Mom

programme.title: The Love Boat: Carol & Doug’s Story, Part 1
programme.desc: Julie catches love fever on the high seas and is thinking of marriage when the Pacific Princess is chartered for a dazzling star-studded wedding cruise that takes Capt. Stubing, his crew, and their guests on a beautiful scenic journey to Alaska.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Carol & Doug’s Story, Part 2
programme.desc: Wealthy Alaskan Buddy Bowers (Lorne Greene) recruits the services of the ship to take the wedding party from Vancouver, B.C., to Skagway, Alaska, for the nuptial ceremonies for his orphaned granddaughter, Carol (Lisa Hartman).

programme.title: The Love Boat: Going My Way / Dance With Me / Doc, Be Patient
programme.desc: When Doc (Bernie Kopell) gets the flu, he receives private treatment from a gorgeous doctor (Susan Sullivan) who keeps his fever up even when his temperature drops.
programme.sub-title: Going My Way / Dance With Me / Doc, Be Patient

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Audit Couple / My Boyfriend's Back / The Scoop
programme.desc: A strict IRS auditor (Phyllis Diller) falls for Capt. Stubing (Gavin MacLeod) until she finds something in his file.
programme.sub-title: The Audit Couple / My Boyfriend's Back / The Scoop

programme.title: The Love Boat: Crew Confessions / Haven't I Seen You? / The Reunion
programme.desc: Isaac (Ted Lange) has trouble on the high seas when the Love Boat crew discovers he has included some racy tales about them in his new novel.
programme.sub-title: Crew Confessions / Haven't I Seen You? / The Reunion

programme.title: The Love Boat: A New Woman / Trial Romance / Never Say Goodbye
programme.desc: In a poignant episode, Capt. Stubling (Gavin McLeod) is reunited with his love child, Vicki (Jill Whelan).
programme.sub-title: A New Woman / Trial Romance / Never Say Goodbye

programme.title: The Love Boat: Brotherhood Of The Sea / Daddy's Pride / Letter To Babycakes
programme.desc: When Julie (Lauren Tewes) joins the ship's secret all-male club, she is shocked by the initiation rites.
programme.sub-title: Brotherhood Of The Sea / Daddy's Pride / Letter To Babycakes

programme.title: The Love Boat: They Tried To Tell Us We're Too Young
programme.desc: A swinging bachelor (Dack Rambo) gets the shock of his life when the phony story he tells his gorgeous girlfriend (Barbi Benton) turns out to be true.
programme.sub-title: They Tried To Tell Us We're Too Young

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Next Step / Life Begins At 40 / The Stimulation Of Stephanie
programme.desc: A college professor (Dick Martin) turns the Love Boat into a laboratory to test the romantic responses of his lovely female student (Char Fontane).
programme.sub-title: The Next Step / Life Begins At 40 / The Stimulation Of Stephanie

programme.title: The Love Boat: Happy Ending / We Three / April's Love
programme.desc: A tantalizing entertainer (Charo) receives some unwanted advice on love from members of the crew, who don't approve of her marriage plans.
programme.sub-title: Happy Ending / We Three / April's Love

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In a special two-hour presentation, a singer (Donny Osmond) trying to break into show business finds out unexpectedly that his hillbilly family has decided to take the cruise.
programme.sub-title: Kinfolk / Sis & The Slicker / Moonlight & Moonshine / Too Close For Comfort / The Affair - Part 1

programme.title: The Love Boat: Rent A Romeo / Matchmaker, Matchmaker / Y'gotta Have Heart
programme.desc: Doc (Bernie Kopell) comes down with a bad case of heartache when the beautiful girl (Misty Rowe) he wants to be alone with boards ship with her ever-present sister (Vicki Lawrence).
programme.sub-title: Rent A Romeo / Matchmaker, Matchmaker / Y'gotta Have Heart

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days: Casanova Cunningham
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: Potsie Quits School
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 1)
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Gets Shot
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: Happy Days: A Night at the Circus
programme.desc: Howard's teen-aged niece, K.C., comes to stay with the Cunninghams after a scandal closes her Houston boarding school while Fonzie hopes a night at the circus will help him win little Heather's heart when nothing else seems to work.

programme.title: Happy Days: Where the Guys Are
programme.desc: After tricking Fonzie into going to a single's camp to help him get over losing steady girlfriend Ashley, Potsie, Chachi and Roger get suckered into a sauna by three con-girls.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Get What You Pay For
programme.desc: Howard decides the house needs a second bathroom. Fonzie offers a way to have it installed and save Howard money as well.
programme.sub-title: You Get What You Pay For

programme.title: Happy Days: Kiss Me Teach
programme.desc: Joanie encounters trouble when she accepts a student teaching job at Patton High.

programme.title: Happy Days: The People vs. The Fonz
programme.desc: His friends are baffled when Fonzie refuses to speak in his own defense after he is accused of manhandling a student and brought before the school board's disciplinary court.

programme.title: Happy Days: School Dazed
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Car
programme.desc: Richie persuades his father to let him have his own car and Fonzie comes up with just the car for him, a hot rod named "Love Bandit," which turns out to be hot in more ways than one.

programme.title: Happy Days: Not With My Sister You Don't
programme.desc: Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.
programme.sub-title: Not With My Sister You Don't

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Moves Out
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Flip Side
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days: Goin' to Chicago
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days: Get A Job
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."

programme.title: Happy Days: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Fonzarelli Part I
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days: Two Angry Men
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days: Sight for Sore Eyes
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Hood
programme.desc: MacGyver's neighbor Kelly Dobbs overhears a plan to have accountant VictorNesbitt murdered. Victor is an accountant with one of Lyle Knox's holding companies and is planning on exposing the company.

programme.title: MacGyver: Honest Abe
programme.desc: MacGyver picks up his best friend's father to take him to his grandson's Bar Mitzvah and finds himself inadvertently involved in an FBI/CIA mission.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Prometheus Syndrome
programme.desc: After Prometheus, a crazed arsonist, is responsible for the death of his old friend, MacGyver sets out to solve the mystery of this madman and capture him.

programme.title: MacGyver: Walking Dead
programme.desc: MacGyver faces the strange and frightening world of Voodoo, as he tries to save his politically active neighbor from a deranged, underground death squad.

programme.title: MacGyver: Good Knight MacGyver-Part 1
programme.desc: A bump on the head takes MacGyver back to 7th century England where he searches for his roots and rescues a beautiful maiden from an evil queen.

programme.title: MacGyver: Good Knight MacGyver-Part 2
programme.desc: A bump on the head takes MacGyver back to 7th century England where he searches for his roots and rescues a beautiful maiden from an evil queen.

programme.title: MacGyver: Deadly Silents
programme.desc: A retired silent film comedian, Pinky, donates his films to the Phoenix Foundation and together, he and MacGyver, find themselves caught in a deadly trap woven by a special effects master named Neil who is out for revenge.

programme.title: MacGyver: Split Decision
programme.desc: MacGyver helps his good friend Dent train for a boxing match and finds that he must rescue Dent's daughter from gamblers who have kidnapped her.

programme.title: MacGyver: Gunz 'N Boys
programme.desc: While working at the Challenger Club, MacGyver finds he must save the local gang kids from Minton, the local gun supplier, who is planning to kill all the gang members as well as letting Brian Jefferies take the wrap for a murder he did not commit.

programme.title: MacGyver: Off the Wall
programme.desc: MacGyver fights to save a housing project after tenants have been forced out of their homes by corrupt money-hungry landlords.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Mountain of Youth
programme.desc: MacGyver and his old friend Jack Dalton discover that inhabitants in a mountain valley live to be over 150 years old. Unfortunately, they also discover that it is the secret site of a heavy water plant used for nuclear weapon technology.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Stringer
programme.desc: When MacGyver becomes intertwined in a scheme to stop Chinese slave labor, he discovers that he has a son, Sam, who is also interested in bringing the fall of the man behind it all.

programme.title: MacGyver: Pilot
programme.desc: MacGyver is a modern-day American hero with the uncanny ability to resolve a crisis in an extremely limited amount of time.

programme.title: MacGyver: Gauntlet
programme.desc: MacGyver escapes from a carefully aimed bazooka shell

programme.title: MacGyver: Golden Triangle
programme.desc: MacGyver unwittingly invades an encampment in the Burmese jungle.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Thief Of Budapest
programme.desc: MacGyver flees from the Budapest police and the KGB while attempting to free a band of gypsy pickpockets imprisoned for stealing a watch containing top-secret information.

programme.title: MacGyver: Trumbo's World
programme.desc: MacGyver fights for his life in one of his most awesome adventures as he travels to the sweltering jungles of South America

programme.desc: After serving with the Union army, John Wayne returns home to be recruited by the governor of Texas to rid the state of crooked carpetbaggers.

programme.title: Sands Of Iwo Jima

programme.title: Three Faces West

programme.title: Flying Tigers

programme.title: Westward Ho

programme.title: Flame Of Barbary Coast
programme.desc: A cowboy competes with a gambling tycoon on the Barbary Coast for the hand of a beautiful dance-hall queen.

programme.title: War Of The Wildcats

programme.title: Red River Range

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Cheryl adds an old rival to the team, but the mothers are not happy with sharing the spotlight; Kalani suffers a catastrophic injury, putting her solo and the group routine in jeopardy; the pressure of winning brings Camryn to her breaking point.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Emotions run high as the team prepares for their final Nationals competition as the Irreplaceables; with four solos, the girls go head-to-head to see who can come out on top; the mothers and the girls contemplate what their future holds.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Abby finally returns to the competition dance scene in Pittsburgh where her legacy first began; emotions run high and tension builds as Abby hopes her new team of seven strangers can dance together as one.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A member of the law enforcement community goes astray; Dog is convinced that a supportive family can provide hope to a sad outcome.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog takes the crew horseback riding in Denver; Dog helps a bondsman friend track a missing longtime customer.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog turns to a fugitive's extended family for clues to his location; the hunt comes down to a single tip that the fugitive is on his way to a relative's apartment.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The engineering marvel Machu Picchu sits perched on a ridge in the Peruvian Andes; originally built by the Incas, this magnificent structure remains a mystery.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Since the invention of gunpowder, fireworks have thrilled audiences around the world; the highlights of fireworks exhibitions throughout history, and go behind the scenes to explore how science and art mingle in this unique, ancient craft.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: From Sherlock Holmes' examination of the physical evidence at a crime scene to today's DNA technology, a review of the history of crime detection through the use of forensic science.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Soft drinks, donuts, meat snacks, popcorn, and gum represent humanity's need to feed cravings; from handmade treats of earliest civilizations to hi-tech mass production, these snack foods evolved through history into modern manufacturing.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: When a burning gusher shoots flames into the air, only a handful of men know how to snuff out the monster; fighting fire with fire, they place explosives around the flames to blow it out, or douse it with tons of water.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Since the turn of the 20th century, designers have competed to build them faster, taller, and steeper; as technology pushes the envelope with flips, weightlessness, and more g-force than a jet, they have to calculate how much can the human body take.
programme.sub-title: Roller Coasters: The Search for the Ultimate Thrill Ride

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Digging up salt mining's history, from the "white gold" on the table to the oceanic and underground deposits whence it came; today people take salt for granted, but most life depends on it.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: In 1954, Gamal Abdel Nasser needed to harness the flow of the world's longest river: the Nile. The Aswan High Dam socially, politically, culturally, and agriculturally affected Egypt.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The history of one of the world's most famous bridges, London's Tower Bridge; when it was erected in 1892, it became a postcard image of London, but the famed gothic towers of this pioneering steel structure, sheathed in stone, are purely decorative.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: In less than a century, the world went from dirt tracks to highways, from propeller planes to space travel, from sailboats to supertankers; in the process, a glut of traffic was created on roadways, railways, airways, and seaways.

programme.title: Modern Marvels Essentials
programme.desc: From banishing waste to battling B-O, the modern bathroom is full of wonders, all devoted to keeping us clean.
