programme.title: Matlock: The Witness Killings (Part 2)
programme.desc: When Matlock returns to his hometown, he ends up defending an accused murderer and becoming the town’s worst enemy.

programme.title: Matlock: The Strangler
programme.desc: Matlock’s personal accountant seeks representation by Ben when he is framed for the brutal murder of his employer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Nightmare
programme.desc: A vacation to a wild west ghost town becomes more than Matlock bargained for as a bump on the head takes him straight back in time to the real old wild west, surrounded by familiar faces – with very unfamiliar occupations.

programme.title: Matlock: The Marriage Counselor
programme.desc: Matlock’s dull, droning insurance broker, Allan Corning finds therapy for his struggling marriage interrupted by the sudden murder of his therapist, Dr. Harding Fletcher.

programme.title: Matlock: The Dame
programme.desc: When Matlock is slapped by an attractive older woman in a restaurant, Ben recalls to Julie the story of his first case – the murder of the man who put him through law school.

programme.title: Matlock: The Suspect (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock comes to the aid of a young socialite accused of murdering her older husband for money.

programme.title: Matlock: The Suspect (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock comes to the aid of a young socialite accused of murdering her older husband for money.

programme.title: Matlock: The Defense
programme.desc: After witnessing a violent argument between his parents, a distraught young man murders his abusive father.

programme.title: Matlock: The Game Show
programme.desc: Matlock comes to the defense of popular game show host Dennis Blake who’s accused of the murder of his successful, yet despised mega-millionaire producer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Foursome
programme.desc: A brash multimillionaire, Ellis Blake is held in the slaying of Jeffrey Holden, a handsome, young man who intended to marry Ellis’ daughter – without his blessing or consent.

programme.title: Matlock: The Picture (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock’s search for evidence to prove his client innocent of killing her husband uncovers a ring of counterfeiters who will pay any price, including murder, to keep their secret. Ben’s investigation uncovers ties to the mob.

programme.title: Matlock: The Outcast (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock’s faith in his ability as a top-notch attorney is completely eroded when he’s dismissed by a client and replaced by a younger lawyer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Outcast (Part 2)
programme.desc: During his fishing trip, Matlock encounters the small, unfriendly town of Lone Pine as he attempts to solve the mysterious death of a young farmhand and uncover a town-wide coverup.

programme.title: Matlock: The Abduction
programme.desc: While attending a UCLA Law seminar, Matlock and Michelle end up in a dangerous dilemma. After giving Matlock inside information regarding an upcoming hit his former law school classmate is involved in a fatal hit and run.

programme.title: Matlock: Mr. Awesome
programme.desc: Matlock defends Anne Johnson, a single mother who’s been accused of murdering her recently estranged boyfriend.

programme.title: Matlock: The Evening News (Part 1)
programme.desc: A phony story is planted on the nightly news when a corrupt land developer pays off the on-air talent but when the producer fakes his own death, the anchorwoman unwittingly helps him along, never realizing it’s somebody else she killed.

programme.title: Matlock: The Evening News (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hired to defend an innocent newscaster, Matlock is baffled until evidence turns up that puts him on the trail of the real killer.

programme.title: South Park: Trygt sted
programme.desc: Cartman er siste offer innen kroppsskam.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmans mor er en hore
programme.desc: Dr. Mephisto hjelper Cartman med å avsløre farens identitet, og alle mannlige innbyggere i South Park er aktuelle kandidater.

programme.title: South Park: Byen ved avgrunnens rand (tilbakeblikk)
programme.desc: Skolebussen krasjer i en snøstorm og blir stående på kanten av et stup.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef prøver å kreve royalties da et plateselskap slipper en låt han hevder han skrev for over 20 år siden.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Tamponger av cherokeehår
programme.desc: Kyle trenger nyretransplantasjon og Cartman er den perfekte donor, men setter en høy pris for nyren: 10 millioner dollar.

programme.title: South Park: Her kommer nabolaget
programme.desc: Token føler seg ensom fordi han er eneste rike barn i byen, og lokker andre velstående mennesker til South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Den nye Terrance og Phillip-filmtraileren
programme.desc: Alle barna i South Park er superspente på å se den første traileren for den nye Terrance og Phillip-filmen.

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Jimmy og Timmy blir medlemmer av gjengen The Crips, som de tror er en klubb for funksjonshemmede.

programme.title: South Park: Feitrumpe og pannekakehode
programme.desc: Cartman lager en J-Lo-fingerdukke til et arrangement som skal hylle latinamerikanere.

programme.title: South Park: Dum, bortskjemt hore-leketøy
programme.desc: Paris Hilton åpner butikk i South Park og forderver jentenes moral - bare Wendy holder fast på sine prinsipper.

programme.title: South Park: Agentbyrået
programme.desc: Som talentmanagere kan Cartman, Stan og Kenny innkassere 10 % av klientenes inntekter, men et annet byrå stjeler deres eneste klient.

programme.title: South Park: En million små fibre
programme.desc: Towelie skriver en bok som blir valgt ut til Oprahs bokklubb og blir en bestselger blant folk som vil overvinne avhengighet.

programme.title: South Park: Mysteriet med toeren på pissoaret
programme.desc: Cartman tror han vet hvem som står bak angrepene 11. september.

programme.title: South Park: Momben
programme.desc: Innbyggerne i South Park forbereder seg til et besøk av Hillary Clinton. Cartman mistenker at en muslimsk elev er involvert i et mulig terroristangrep.

programme.title: South Park: Mer drittproblemer
programme.desc: Randy slår verdensrekorden 'største bæsj', og den tidligere rekordinnehaveren Bono vil ha tilbake tronen. Men han har en mørk hemmelighet som kanskje kan hindre ham.

programme.title: South Park: Britneys nye stil
programme.desc: Mediesirkuset kommer til South Park når Britney gjemmer seg i den avsidesliggende fjellbyen. Guttene prøver å hjelpe den plagede popstjernen.

programme.title: South Park: Kina-problemet
programme.desc: Cartman blir forskrekket over den storslåtte OL-seremonien og ber Butters om hjelp til å konfrontere kineserne. Samtidig blir Stan og Kyle vitne til 'voldtekten' av Indiana Jones.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Fiskepikker
programme.desc: Jimmi er rasende for at Cartmann prøver å ta æren for en vits som han fant på og som nå er blitt populær i hele landet. Men en sint Kanye West klarer ikke å forstå poenget.

programme.title: South Park: Døde kjendiser
programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: South Park: Sexhjelpen
programme.desc: Kyle og Butters befinner seg midt blant Amerikas superkjendiser når de gjennomgår en behandling for sexavhengighet. Cartman og Stan er limt til Tiger Woods-kampen.

programme.title: South Park: Lattermaskinen
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt gjort narr av på The South Park Elementary Comedy Awards, bygger Germany en uovervinnerlig lattermaskin: Funnybot. Men dens planer for menneskeheten går likevel ikke altfor bra.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman finner kjærligheten
programme.desc: Cartman spiller matchmaker når en ny jente flytter til South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Timmy 2000
programme.desc: Guttene hermer etter Timmy, som har ADHD, for å slippe å gjøre lekser.

programme.title: South Park: Noe du kan gjøre med fingeren din
programme.desc: Guttene danner boybandet 'Fingerbang' og får spillejobb på kjøpesenteret.
programme.sub-title: Noe du kan gjøre med fingeren din

programme.title: South Park: Musikalen 'Hellen Keller!'
programme.desc: Guttene setter opp sin egen versjon av Helen Kellers historie for å overgå barnehagens forestilling.

programme.title: South Park: En stige til himmelen
programme.desc: Guttene bryter seg inn for å stjele urnen med Kennys aske.

programme.title: South Park: Feitrumpe og pannekakehode
programme.desc: Cartman lager en J-Lo-fingerdukke til et arrangement som skal hylle latinamerikanere.

programme.title: South Park: Kristne rocker hardt
programme.desc: Cartman er fast bestemt på å få platinaplate med sitt nye kristne band Faith+1.

programme.title: South Park: Moro med kampsportvåpen
programme.desc: Guttene kjøper våpen på et loppemarked og blir forvandlet til japanske anime-krigere, med alvorlige konsekvenser for stakkars Butters.

programme.title: South Park: Dø, hippie, dø
programme.desc: Cartman blir arrestert for å fange hippier, men når South Park blir oversvømmet av hippier, vender de seg til ham og hans uvanlige metoder for hippiefjerning.

programme.title: South Park: Agentbyrået
programme.desc: Som talentmanagere kan Cartman, Stan og Kenny innkassere 10 % av klientenes inntekter, men et annet byrå stjeler deres eneste klient.

programme.title: South Park: Mer drittproblemer
programme.desc: Randy slår verdensrekorden 'største bæsj', og den tidligere rekordinnehaveren Bono vil ha tilbake tronen. Men han har en mørk hemmelighet som kanskje kan hindre ham.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle står overfor sitt store gjennombrudd med Guitar Hero-ferdighetene sine. Manageren deres overbeviser Stan om at Kyle holder ham tilbake, og skaper spenninger mellom dem.

programme.title: South Park: Barneskolemusikal
programme.desc: Musikalfeberen når South Park, og guttene må spille med eller miste popularitet.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Fiskepikker
programme.desc: Jimmi er rasende for at Cartmann prøver å ta æren for en vits som han fant på og som nå er blitt populær i hele landet. Men en sint Kanye West klarer ikke å forstå poenget.

programme.title: South Park: Tiss
programme.desc: Høyt urininnhold i svømmebassenget fører til en katastrofe som ødelegger guttas dag, særlig Kyles. Og Cartmans xenofobi får fritt utløp igjen.

programme.title: South Park: Broadway-brødrene
programme.desc: Når Randy forstår hemmeligheten bak musikaler, kan han ikke slutte med å ta med seg Sharon for å se dem. Andrew Lloyd-Webber og Elton John advarer ham mot å avsløre deres hemmelighet.

programme.title: South Park: Butter slår tilbake
programme.desc: Butters blir i hemmelighet plaget av sin bestemor og Stan ønsker å øke bevisstheten om farene ved mobbing. Stans idé er å spille inn en stor dansevideo, men suksessen raskt går til hodet på ham.

programme.title: South Park: Glutenfri ebola
programme.desc: South Park blir glutenfritt.

programme.title: South Park: Pre-CIS
programme.desc: Ifølge Eric Cartman har Wendy Testaburger blitt lesbisk.

programme.title: South Park: Du yelper ikke til
programme.desc: Cartman ser seg som den beste restaurantkritikeren på nettet i South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Legg den fra deg
programme.desc: Nord-Korea sikter mot South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Hummel-figurer og heroin
programme.desc: Feirede underholdere faller fra i sine beste år på grunn av massive overdoser av opiater. Stan er i ferd med å bli avslørt som kilden til de illegale stoffene.

programme.title: South Park: Dobbeltrøbbel i Kina
programme.desc: Randy ser en mulighet for Tegridy i China.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Chefs salte sjokoladeboller
programme.desc: Chef får ikke solgt karamellene sine på en filmfestival, så han går over til salte sjokoladeballer og lager en reklamesang.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef prøver å kreve royalties da et plateselskap slipper en låt han hevder han skrev for over 20 år siden.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Verdens største blokkfløytekonsert
programme.desc: Klassen skal spille på en blokkfløytekonsert i Mr Garrisons hjemby i Arkansas, og forsøker å finne den mystiske 'brune lyden'.

programme.title: South Park: Timmy 2000
programme.desc: Guttene hermer etter Timmy, som har ADHD, for å slippe å gjøre lekser.

programme.title: South Park: Noe du kan gjøre med fingeren din
programme.desc: Guttene danner boybandet 'Fingerbang' og får spillejobb på kjøpesenteret.
programme.sub-title: Noe du kan gjøre med fingeren din

programme.title: South Park: Musikalen 'Hellen Keller!'
programme.desc: Guttene setter opp sin egen versjon av Helen Kellers historie for å overgå barnehagens forestilling.

programme.title: South Park: En stige til himmelen
programme.desc: Guttene bryter seg inn for å stjele urnen med Kennys aske.

programme.title: South Park: Feitrumpe og pannekakehode
programme.desc: Cartman lager en J-Lo-fingerdukke til et arrangement som skal hylle latinamerikanere.

programme.title: South Park: Kristne rocker hardt
programme.desc: Cartman er fast bestemt på å få platinaplate med sitt nye kristne band Faith+1.

programme.title: South Park: Moro med kampsportvåpen
programme.desc: Guttene kjøper våpen på et loppemarked og blir forvandlet til japanske anime-krigere, med alvorlige konsekvenser for stakkars Butters.

programme.title: South Park: Dø, hippie, dø
programme.desc: Cartman blir arrestert for å fange hippier, men når South Park blir oversvømmet av hippier, vender de seg til ham og hans uvanlige metoder for hippiefjerning.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The investigation of a country star's murder revolves around a driven TV producer (Barbara Mandrell) and her daughter, a timid songwriter.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist murders his estranged wife and frames a patient for the crime.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A sultry but sinister pharmaceutical rep is dead set on winning the heart of the hospital's chief of staff.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A beach boy involved with a gang member's sister is a suspect in his murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A surgeon (Wayne Rogers) drops dead while he's operating on another doctor (Jack Klugman).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A pilot of an airliner carrying Dr. Sloan and Amanda to a medical conference in Europe is murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A wealthy woman and her lover concoct an elaborate scheme to do in her husband.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A comedian (Tim Conway) makes a bumbling attempt to do in his more successful former partner (Harvey Korman)---whose wife turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A mad bomber whom Dr. Sloan helped put away has escaped and wants the good doctor blown away.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve becomes embroiled in political intrigue after the murder of a city councilman's wife appears to be part of a larger political strategy.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark investigates when her older lover, a new state Supreme Court Justice, murders a teenage girl.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A Malibu Hills fire is the backdrop for rising tensions between the residents; a disgraced stockbroker, a naturalist, a worried father, and a land developer. A worried Dr. Sloan deals with his own parental fears when Steve helps fight the fire.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Community General is already under increased security, with a high-profile criminal hospitalized, when an important businesswoman is brought in. Mark suspects her security guard has deadly intentions.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse's new part-time job as a trainer of the pro basketball Mustangs turns deadly when he's accused of murdering a star player.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a plastic surgeon when an actress's death apparently results from an infection contracted during surgery.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda are assigned to the task force investigating an airplane crash. An adversarial FBI agent and Russian mobsters make their assignment more difficult.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve and Ron lead the chase for the stolen nuclear material.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The Sloans run into plenty of industry politics when they investigate the death of television network executive, Rachel Woodrall. Seamy revelations about Woodrall's college sorority lead to the killer.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After Annie (Amy Pietz) loses her boyfriend, her job and her agent, she impulsively accepts a date with her local drycleaner, Gil (guest star Ken Campbell),and spends an evening to remember.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) decide to go out on their first official "date" together on Halloween, but their romantic evening turns into fright night when Richard gets himself into a rooftop jam.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline stumbles across Richard's (Malcolm Gets) divorce papers in his desk drawer, but an office mishap sends her on a frantic paper chase to retrieve the documents after they are lost in the interoffice mail.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Tired of losing acting roles to other, more well-endowed women, Annie (Amy Pietz) surprises the gang on Thanksgiving Day by announcing that she plans to get breast implants.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard gets an offer that his empty bank account can't refuse: his Aunt Frieda promises to give him $5,000 as a Bar Mitzvah gift if he agrees to finally go through the ceremony.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard (Malcolm Gets) agrees to let Reg become a houseguest after the cartoonist has a fight with his girlfriend, Wanda.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Big Bad Bed

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Del (Eric Lutes) experience mixed results when they become office mentors to a young cartoonist with an overactive libido and an eager marketing student.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to take Charlie (guest star Andy Lauer) under her wing and teach him the fundamentals of life after Del (Eric Lutes) is forced to fire the hapless in-line skater from his job at the greeting card company.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to right an old wrong by giving up a romantic weekend in Boston with Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help out a visiting childhood chum, Joanie (guest star Kelly Coffield), whom Caroline once bullied in school.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And Joanie And The Stick

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and the gang visit Caroline's family home in Pestigo, Wisconsin, but the homecoming is ruined when her parents tell Caroline that they are selling the house.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) gives Richard(Malcolm Gets) a 7 p.m. deadline to make a marital commitment to her, then is coerced into spending the day making pottery with Del (Eric Lutes) and Annie (Amy Pietz) while she anxiously awaits his decision.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After deciding they can't wait to get married, Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) plan their nuptials for the following week.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: As Caroline and Richard (Malcolm Gets) prepare to leave for Italy to visit his newborn son, Richard makes a confession that gives Caroline second thoughts about their future together.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline Duffy (Lea Thompson) has her professional life just theway she wants it. "Caroline in the City," the comic strip she created, turned intomerchandising gold with an array of greeting cards, books and calendars.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Del are moments away from departing for a weekend trip to Atlantic City when Richard bursts into the apartment with news that he has been mugged.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Annie scheme to get Richard's paintings displayed in a prestigious gallery, and he's thrilled when their efforts earn him the recognition of gallery owner Kenneth Arabian.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Gay Art Show

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Del(Eric Lutes) get carried away competing on the racquetball court, Caroline injures her back and ends up confined to bed.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline gets stiffed at her ATM, she meets with bank personnel to retrieve her money. However, because the surveillance camera captured her in an awkward moment, she's too embarrassed to let the bank manager view the tape of her transaction.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Del agree to go to dinner with Annie and Warren, her new boyfriend, they find that Annie left out one minor detail about his background --Warren's an ex-convict with a burglary record.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline finds out the Christmas gift Del gave her might have been extremely expensive, she ponders the message he may be trying to send her about their relationship.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard sets Caroline up on a date with an art council member who happens to hold the key to Richard's future as a successful artist, but when he finds out the man is married Richard wrestles with protecting a friend or furthering his career.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Richard bicker over their shared work space, Caroline finds the perfect solution when she purchases an antique partner's desk from the desk's original owners, writing and life partners Vic Stansky and Stella Dawson.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Annie re-introduces Caroline to the wonderful world of dating, by taking her on a man-hunt, but when Caroline thinks she has met the perfect man, she later finds that he's no love connection.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del surprises Caroline (Lea Thompson) with a marriage proposal, Richard (Malcolm Gets) feels he no longer fits into Caroline's life and decides it's time to look for another job.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del (Eric Lutes) takes Caroline (Lea Thompson) on a spontaneous weekend trip, they unexpectedly run into Del’s bitter ex-wife Jill (guest star Joely Fisher) and her boyfriend Blair (guest star Kenny Johnson).

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Annie discover that a John Landis movie is shooting in their neighborhood, they jump at the chance to become extras, but Annie’s excitement turns to sheer bliss when she learns that her dream man is starring in the film.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) helps Richard (Malcolm Gets) confront unresolved issues with his jet-setting mother, Natalie (Elizabeth Ashley, “Evening Shade”), when she makes a surprise visit to New York.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) entrusts Annie(Amy Pietz) with various maid-of-honor duties, she learns that Annie’s strong suits aren’t dependability and punctuality and their frien2dship strains under the stress of preparing for Caroline’s wedding.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is confused by nervous pangs and Del experiences panic attacks. Meanwhile, Richard decides to confess his love to Caroline as a last-ditch effort to stop her from marrying Del.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline decides that if she and Del resume dating they should abstain from lovemaking for a fortnight and instead focus on what’s at the core of their relationship.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is thrilled when romantic sparks fly between her and the emergency room veterinarian who treats Salty for a minor injury.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline finally discovers that Richard is back in New York, she offers him his old position back and Richard must decide if he wants to be in Caroline's life again.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie finds herself being audited by IRS agent Jimmy Callahan she misconstrues his friendly manner for amorous interest.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline's young boyfriend Joe declares his undying love for her, she realizes that she is not ready for the level of commitment that Joe arrived at so quickly.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Guy Who Gets There Too Soon

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard's dream of being a paid artist comes true when he is commissioned to paint a mural for New York City.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When gentile Del falls for Risa Glickman, who only dates Jewish men, he takes drastic measures to pretend that he is Jewish.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Nice Jewish Boy

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Ring the bells! Spread the word! Latka Gravas and Simka Dahblitz are getting married, and the dingy Sunshine Cab Co. garage is transformed into a chapel of beauty for the social event of the cabbies' season.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The unflappable Jim gets an unexpected jolt when a wrecking ball crashes through the wall of his condemned apartment. A disaster ensues when he is forced to move in with Louie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The drivers bare their souls, recalling those moments in their lives when fate caused them to detour from the street of dreams down the alley to becoming a cabbie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: As Elaine nears a decision on her future, the cabbies reminisce about those glorious things that "might have been" had fate not sent them down that treacherous road to the Sunshine Cab Co.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Reverend Jim comes to the rescue when Alex is consumed by gambling fever after a lucky night in Atlantic City.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Simka learns that Latka has been unfaithful, she is bound by tradition to do the same thing with one of Latka's fellow cabbies.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After Latka has an affair with a female cabbie, Simka must do the same with one of his co-workers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jeff ends up in serious trouble after he confesses to stealing from the garage to protect the real villain.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex dreams of a new career in show business when he takes a part-time job as an assistant to a Broadway producer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious complications unfold when Louie starts dating the mercurial Emily after vowing never to see her again.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Louie learns that his old girlfriend, Zena, is getting married, he boycotts the wedding and decides to barge in on her honeymoon.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tries to polish the diamond-in-the-rough, Louie, into a real gem—while Louie decides to change his image by moving into a fancy apartment building.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex starts driving all the other cabbies crazy when he discovers his beloved family pet only has a short time to live.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine becomes a nervous wreck when her young son decides to give up the oboe and take up boxing under the tutelage of Tony.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Jim's old girlfriend shows up hoping to rekindle their romance, Alex quickly sets out to win her heart away from her former suitor.
programme.sub-title: Alex Gets Burned By An Old Flame

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: On the eve of the biggest fight of his career, Tony loses interest in boxing when his girlfriend announces she may be expecting his baby.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie is worried his blind girlfriend will no longer love him if an operation to restore her sight is successful.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: To what lengths will boyfriend Arnie go to win over Elaine's kids? Elaine is in for a surprise when she invites him over to meet her children.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies come to the rescue when Jim tries to convince his family that he didn't squander his inheritance by buying a run-down restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Latka worries that Simka's wacky behavior might cost her the right to remain permanently in America.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies embark on a frantic race against time when they team up in a wild nonstop drive from New York to Miami so that Alex can see his long-lost daughter on her twenty-minute layover at the airport in the premiere episode of Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex’s romantic instincts are triggered by the sexy voice at the answering service. Her alluring manner prompts him to arrange a dinner date that turns into a big surprise on Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A pretty girl has John in a whirl, and his determination to meet her prompts the taxi gang to come up with a surefire line that would unfreeze any woman on earth in Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: PGA Tour Originals
programme.desc: In 2018, Bud Cauley was in a life-threatening car accident that derailed his career. This is his story.

programme.title: PGA Tour Originals
programme.desc: The Tito's Shorties Classic returns with Keith Mitchell, Charley Hull, Jake Knapp and Ben Griffin.

programme.title: 2008 AT&T Byron Nelson
programme.desc: Reliving the 2008 AT&T Byron Nelson, where Adam Scott prevailed over Ryan Moore in a playoff.

programme.title: PGA TOUR -- The Drop
programme.desc: Diving into the intensity of tournament play, previewing what's ahead and recapping storylines; giving fans a unique look at the players on and off the course.

programme.title: The CUT
programme.desc: Scottie Scheffler prepares to defend at THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson. Aaron Rai's win at the PGA Championship.

programme.title: Gary Woodland Wins the 2026 Texas Children's Houston Open
programme.desc: Gary Woodland wins for the first time in over 6 years and just 2 1/2 years removed from brain surgery.

programme.title: THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson 2025 ----- Sunday
programme.desc: Watch the final round of THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson 2025 at TPC Craig Ranch.

programme.title: 2023 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson - Final Round
programme.desc: Revisit final round action from THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson event.

programme.title: PGA TOUR Backspin
programme.desc: Watch the latest highlights from the best players in the world from courses around the PGA TOUR.

programme.title: The Starter
programme.desc: Catch up on all the latest happenings on the PGA TOUR with feature content on the best players in the world.

programme.title: Wyndham Clark Wins 2023 Truist Championship
programme.desc: Wyndham Clark gets his first victory on the PGA TOUR after winning the 2023 Truist Championship.

programme.title: Hideki Matsuyama Wins the 2025 Hero World Challenge
programme.desc: Hideki Matsuyama won his second event of 2025 in a playoff at Albany GC in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Scottie Scheffler Wins the Memorial Tournament 2025
programme.desc: Scottie Scheffler dominates a tough test at Jack Nicklaus' beloved Muirfield Village Golf Club in Dublin, Ohio.

programme.title: Justin Thomas Wins the RBC Heritage
programme.desc: Justin Thomas erased a nearly three-year victory drought at Harbour Town Golf Links for his 16th TOUR victory.

programme.title: 2025 Trophy Hassan II
programme.desc: Watch PGA TOUR Champions action from Royal Golf Dar Es Salam in Rabat, Morocco.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Gjenforening, andre del
programme.desc: I andre del av gjenforeningen av Jersey Shore familieferie, finner Justina Valentine sesongens mest dramatiske scener.. Hva er status for Angelina og Vinny 2.0? Hva er Nicoles neste skritt i slekthistoriereisen? En uvelkommen gjest sjokkerer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: RSVP drar til New Yorks største italienske festival San Gennaro's Feast for å hjelpe Vinny å finne kjærligheten. Ang vil bli popstjerne. Nicole får mer informasjon om sin biologiske mor.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Løper...for pizza
programme.desc: Gutta drar til Connecticut for å se Vinnys første standupshow. Deena tar seg en pizza. Sammi og Ronnie snakker endelig sammen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Romkameratene samles for å lege gamle sår. Ang endrer mening.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Vinny tror han har feber. Jentene tar privatjet for å se Pauly spinne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Tur til bondegården
programme.desc: Angelina snakker med spøkelser. Mike setter alle i arbeid.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Eggcellent
programme.desc: Etter en dag med ærlig 'arbeid' på bondegården, får gjengen oppleve fra jord til bord.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Lage Barn-Cologne
programme.desc: Gjengen fester i Atlantic City på Halloween. Pauly planlegger en stor overraskelse for Nikki.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jenni har sin regissørdebut. Gjengen gjør seg klar til sin første internasjonale familiferie på mange år.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Pauly og Nikki drar til Jamaica en dag tidligere for å feire årsdagen sin. Mike har en overraskelse til det lykkelige paret.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Pauly og Nikki leker Kirsten Giftekniv for Vinny. Snooki og Sammi ankommer Jamaica.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Guido-bobsledelag
programme.desc: Gjengen tar seg en heisatur. Vinny slår til.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Last Shot at Love' med Vinny G
programme.desc: New Yorks mest kvalifiserte ungkar søker kjærligheten i sitt eget datingshow.
programme.sub-title: Last Shot at Love' med Vinny G

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Come on Eileen
programme.desc: Gjengen omfavner Jamaicas vakre fossefall og lokale kjøkken. Vinny omfavner Ailin.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Angelinas hevn
programme.desc: Lauren og Mike planlegger forlovelsesfest for Sammi. Onkel Nino ankommer Jamaica.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: 1209 Ocean Terrace
programme.desc: Gjengen planlegger sitt 15-årsjubileum. Ronnie og Sammi gjenforenes i strandhuset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Gjengen (egentlig Danny) omvandler Shore Store til en stor prisgalla når de feirer 15 år sammen! Kjøttbollene foreslår at de skal finne kjærligheten til Vinnys mamma.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Reunion del 1
programme.desc: Gjengen gjenforenes for å feire 15 år med kaos og ikoniske øyeblikk. Fra Cape Mays spøkelsesjakt til Nicoles familebakgrunnsreise. Første del viser overraskelser, favorittminner og det store spørsmålet: er Sammi og Ronnie klare til å skvære opp?
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Reunion del 1

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Gjenforeningen fortsetter med sol, skygge og sjokkøyeblikk. Gjengen opplever drama og moro på Jamaica. Er Angelina og Lauren fortsatt låst i "småunge"-krangelen? Pluss favorittøyeblikk, overraskelsesgjester og latter i løpet av 15 år med strandliv.
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Reunion del 2

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Noboy Knows…
programme.desc: Mary can't get the hang of parallel parking, so she uses her feminine wiles to pass her driver's test.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: All That Jazz
programme.desc: A friend of Lucy's seeks refuge in her closet as she tries to deal with the death of his mother.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: The Tribes That Bind
programme.desc: The church ladies throw Annie a baby shower and end up snooping in her house!

programme.title: 7th Heaven: In Praise of Women
programme.desc: The Camdens await the arrival of the twins as Annie endures a long, hard labor.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: Matt takes a job as a fast food delivery boy to get out of the house and away from the crying babies.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Paranoia
programme.desc: Lucy's ex-boyfriend Jimmy Moon is in serious trouble, and she desperately tries to help him.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Sometimes That's Just the Way It Is
programme.desc: Mary and Lucy narrowly escape serious injury when a drunk driver smashes into their car.
programme.sub-title: Sometimes That's Just the Way It Is

programme.title: 7th Heaven: We the People
programme.desc: Mrs. Hinkle, Mary, Lucy, and even Matt and Shana lend a hand to their industrious younger siblings with the paper route.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: The Voice
programme.desc: The custodian at Simon's school tells the Reverend that he's been hearing the voice of God.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: All Dogs Go To Heaven
programme.desc: Matt's trying to look out for his younger sister, but Mary is fighting for her right to party.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: There Goes the Bride (Part 1)
programme.desc: In the first of this two-part episode, Heather is back in town and getting married, but Matt finds out an awful secret about her fiance.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: There Goes the Bride (Part 2)
programme.desc: In the dramatic conclusion of this two-part episode, Heather finds out the ugly truth about her betrothed, while Matt tries to convince Shana that he still loves her.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt finally moves out and Dad visits the hospital via the emergency room.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric's post heart-attack zest for life is making everyone a little crazy.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric counsels a young man who feels his wife should be meek and subservient, while Annie and the girls rally for women's rights in Afghanistan.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt hates his job and tries to decide what to do with his life.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt refuses to help a classmate cheat, and gets in trouble anyway.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Aunt Julie goes into labor while visiting the Camdens, but there's no car or help to be found.

programme.title: Shaolin Wooden Men
programme.desc: Etter å ha vært vitne til drapet på sin far, trener «Little Mute» i Shaolin-tempelet for å ta hevn, der han blir undervist av ulike lærere. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Game of Death NO
programme.desc: Filmstjerna Billy må gang på gang håndtere en kriminell liga som utpresser ham for penger, og syndikatlederen er ikke fornøyd med hvordan Billy nekter å la seg skremme. Kommer en leiemorder til å bli Billys endelige overmann?

programme.title: Police Story 2 NO
programme.desc: Med narkotikakongen Chu Tao bak lås og slå lever inspektør Chan og kjæresten hans et rolig og lykkelig liv. Men når Tao blir erklært dødssyk blir han sluppet ut fra fengsel for å få noen siste måneder i frihet.

programme.title: The Killer Meteors
programme.desc: Hua Wu Bin blir kalt The Killer Meteor takket være hans unike hemmelige kampkunster, som har gjort ham til en helt i hjemtraktene. Når en adelsmann blir forgiftet av sin kone, blir Hua leid inn for å få tak i en kur og beseire henne.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Donatello, Rafael, Michelangelo og Leonardo er muterte, grønne ninja-skilpadder som elsker pizza og lever under New Yorks gateplan. Derifra tar de opp kampen mot den ondskapsfulle forbryteren Shredder og hans armé av svartkledde krigere.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
programme.desc: Det hele begynner med en at en magisk spire transporterer deres gode venn April gjennom tid og rom, helt til samuraienes Japan. Leonardo og gjengen drar med en gang etter henne, og må nå beseire den onde Lord Naringa for å redde April.

programme.title: Shaolin Wooden Men
programme.desc: Etter å ha vært vitne til drapet på sin far, trener «Little Mute» i Shaolin-tempelet for å ta hevn, der han blir undervist av ulike lærere. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Dragon Lord
programme.desc: Jakten på kjærligheten og rampestrekene til Dragon og barndomsvennen Buller blir avbrytt når de hører at en gjeng begynner å smugle kinesiske nasjonal skatter utenlands. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Jake gets married to a girl he just met. John buys a faux designer clock as a gift, which gets broken.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John helps a homeless man he discovered is a con artist when he learns the man is ill.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John panics when he has to get an MRI, finally resorting to Valium to get through the claustrophobic test.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John takes Reggies advice to be more sensitive with women. It helps at the office with Margaret, but backfires with a woman he is dating.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprised when a patient is disappointed at the news that he's not terminally ill. Jake scams Bob in a Scrabble game.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie goes out to dinner with her abusive friend Sara and Sara's husband, Richard. She finds that she and Richard are attracted to each other.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John believes that Christmas is a phony time of the year. Instead of embracing the Christmas spirit, he uses getting robbed as vindication for his position.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie and Chris compete for John's affection. Linda takes Margaret out for a night on the town.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: As John and Jake chat about Chris at the diner, Bob rushes in and announces that he just saw Chris naked when he went to fix her faucet.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a videotape of a French film that he plans to use to lure Chris into coming over to his place.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker tries to discourage a friend from expressing interest in Chris by telling him that she is gay.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris is in the kitchen when a robber enters.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, John expresses his repulsion for all the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.
programme.sub-title: I’ve Got Friends I Haven’t Used Yet

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chris' ex-husband, Roger, is in town and comes to the diner to see her.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: France and Spain: The Pyrenees
programme.desc: Monty treks one of the toughest and most famous freedom trails out of Nazi controlled France, taking him through the valleys and high ridges of the Pyrenees mountains and into Spain.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Vidkun Quisling
programme.desc: Vidkun Quisling, once honored for diplomacy, turned traitor by collaborating with Nazis. His bid for power in Norway failed, relegated by Germans. Despite being named "fuehrer," his reign led to repression until his hanging post-Nazi defeat.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Devil's Due
programme.desc: During WWII, Greek Prime Ministers Tsolakoglou, Logothetopoulos, and Rallis collaborated with Nazi occupiers, imposing fees that caused a famine.

programme.title: Hitler's Mega Plane
programme.desc: In January 2012, Italian divers discovered the wreck of a massive plane off the coast of Sardinia. At a depth of 65 meters (213 feet) lies a Messerschmidt “Gigant”, the biggest aircraft in WWII.

programme.title: Secret War: The Dutch Disaster
programme.desc: Operation North Pole was a WWII German deception using captured SOE agents to mislead Britain. 47 of 50 agents were captured. Despite warnings, SOE ignored signs of compromise to maintain support, leading to a major intelligence failure.

programme.title: Secret War: The Mafia Connection
programme.desc: Lucky Luciano, a mafia boss of the 1930s, was in jail in 1942 on charges of running prostitution rings. US intelligence services did a deal with him and he got the Italians to share intelligence on German U boat movements.

programme.title: Hitler and I: Reflections on Evil
programme.desc: An in-depth, behind-the-scenes exploration of the making of the miniseries "Hitler: The Rise of Evil."

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Arajs Kommando
programme.desc: Viktor Arajs, a Latvian, played a significant role in the Holocaust, collaborating with the Nazis to eliminate Jews. Leading the Arajs Kommando, he orchestrated the killings of around 30,000 Jews. Arajs justified his actions as patriotic defense.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The IRA Conspiracy
programme.desc: During WWII, the IRA's "S Plan" aimed to bomb Britain, drawing German support to weaken the British. "Operation Green" and "Plan Kathleen" envisioned IRA aiding a German invasion of Northern Ireland, but both failed due to bungling and infighting.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Good Collaborators?
programme.desc: Finland defended itself in the Winter War under Marshal Mannerheim. Finland allied with Nazi Germany against the Soviet Union in 1941. Finland later negotiated peace with the Allies and switched sides as Nazi defeat became apparent.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Croatian Collaborator
programme.desc: Croatia grapples with its fascist past through figures like Dinko Sakic, once hailed as a hero but later convicted of war crimes. Leading the notorious Jasenovac camp, Sakic oversaw brutal atrocities against inmates.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Preparing for War
programme.desc: Hitler unveils his military plans: annex Austria, seize the Sudetenland, and eventually invade Poland and the Soviet Union. By March 1938, Austria falls bloodlessly. By September 1939, he invades Poland, sparking World War Two.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Artillery, "The King of Battle," has shaped history from ancient cannons to today's M777 Howitzer. Host Wil Willis visits Fort Sill, Oklahoma, to witness modern artillery like the M777 and M109 Paladin in action.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Weapons That Changed The World examines the RPG-7, renowned for its ability to take on tanks and level buildings. Host Wil Willis traces its evolution from WWII's Bazooka to modern counterparts like the AT-4 and Carl Gustav.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: Japan attacks the USA on 7 Dec 1941. For the next 6 months, they continue to have successful attacks.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: The Sulmona Trail
programme.desc: Monty follows the route taken by prisoner of war Len Harley, who spent months on the run before braving snow, ice, and Nazi patrols to escape over the mountains of the Majella in Italy.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: Allies turn the tide in the Atlantic, where initially German U-Boats harass freely convoys to supply Britain. The route to bring American soldiers who will land on D-Day is clear.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Based on the hit US reality show America's Next Top Model this UK version presented by Lisa Snowdon follows the latest group of hopefuls through their journey to becoming Britain's newest 'Top Model'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The competition begins. The first photo shoot takes place in the Milton Keynes SnowZone with the girls forced to withstand temperatures as low as minus 5 degrees. Immediatley Lianna feels like an outsider, not getting along with other girls.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls get their makeovers and the inevitable tears and tantrums follow. The girls pair up for a girl on girl photo shoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls learn about cheese cake pin-up and dancing from Britain's own 'Queen of Burlesque' Immodesty Blaize. Two girls recieve harsh criticism from casting director Beth Charkham when faced with the challenge of a commercial set in a swimming pool.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining models learn about ballroom dancing from top ballroom dancer Brendan Cole and Lianna struggles to get it right. Then they do a full dance with music. One girl gets upset when not chosen by the winner to join her for her reward.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls train with personal trainer Chris Mundle. Then straight after training, sweating and smelling, they head to meet top designers. They have a Gothic Bride photo shoot, with most girls struggling to get a good shot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining models undergo a heavy metallic make-up photo shoot with John Swanell. Lisa arrives at the house and the girls have to critique each other, which causes even more fights. A practical joke gets taken the wrong way.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls shoot a thirty second jewellery promotion with top promo director Jason Clifford. Lucy, last years winner, visits the girls and gives them some tips. They have a country life photo shoot and there is a shock at elimination.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: With two people gone the house becomes even more divided. The girls meet Saffron Aldridge, top style expert, who goes through their wardrobes with no mercy. They have a one on one with Lisa and the girls are awe-struck when they meet a famous model.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The four remaining models head to Morocco and Lisa gives them the day off. They are given the challenge of finding an outfit for Lisa. They have their first Moroccan photo shoot and the final three are chosen.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In the finale the three remaining models have their final photo shoot and the final two compete in a catwalk show and one girl is crowned 'Britain's Next Top Model'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls immediately face their first challenge, posing in front of the press. They then meet stylist Hilary Alexander, who asks them when they lost their virginity and what they think about unprotected sex.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls take part in a catwalk challenge set by Otis Isles, the internationally respected casting director, model agent, and fashion producer, who tells them to dress in underwear.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls arrive at the English National Ballet School, where Lisa introduces them to ballet teacher Louise Halliday. They learn about the art of ballet to help with their movement.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls order a pizza and find Lisa Mail for the challenge the following morning. A huge fight breaks out between Stefanie and Louise.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls are taken to Debenhams, where they get the chance to meet Caprice. They are given fifteen minutes to find an outfit for different occasions.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls arrive at a bar where they meet music video director Paul Hills. Their challenge is to star in a music video along with The Wolfmen.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls are woken up by a grueling morning workout from Celebrity Personal Trainer Nicki Waterman. Some struggle with the workout, especially Sherece.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi are eager to book a night away in a hotel after Teddy keeps sleeping in their bed; Kate is allowed to stay home alone but doesn't follow Adam and Andi's strict rules.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam offers to go on a vegan diet with Kate in an effort to bond with her, his love of meat proves a hard habit to break.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: After Adam throws out his back on his 50th birthday, he is still determined to take a dirt bike excursion and check it off his bucket list; Don and Adam give out bonuses at work.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam gets jealous when Teddy names Andi as his hero for a school essay.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam accidentally invites Andi to go on the guys' annual trip, he tries to un-invite her, which only makes matters worse.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam recruits Marcy to put Andi's snooty sister in her place when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi see how much Lowell's new relationship with Andi's sister is changing him, they stage an intervention to get him to stop putting up with her bad behavior.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi's doctor advises her to stop taking birth control pills, Adam and Andi disagree on an alternate option.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Dave has a cold that has him acting like a baby, and Debbie's treating him like one; Rebecca and Joanna, however, think he's overreacting and are concerned he's going to ruin their spa weekend away

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Don become super protective of Lowell when they think he might get back together with his cheating ex-wife; Joe experiences an unexpected side effect from his new pacemaker.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi offer Teddy dating advice but wind up making things super awkward for him instead.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam encourages Don to give himself food poisoning to get out of babysitting his destructive grandson; Adam and Andi argue over who has to take Kate and her teenage friends dress shopping.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam buys a boat without asking Andi, they wind up in couples therapy to settle the disagreement.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam discovers someone is sneaking his boat out at night, and he assumes the culprits are Don and Joe; after Andi makes Kate get a job at the mall, Kate decides she no longer wants to go to college.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don disagree about a new house to flip for their construction business, their bickering reveals bigger issues in their relationship; Andi goes to great lengths to throw the perfect birthday party for Bev.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam's mother-in-law Alice makes an unexpected visit and reveals some shocking news.
programme.sub-title: Stuck In The Middle With You

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi resort to their usual punishment in response to Teddy's bad grades, his unexpected reaction catches them off guard.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi attempt to spice up their social life by making new friends.
programme.sub-title: Adam and Andi See Other People

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam has trouble helping Katie prepare for her driving test; Don turns to Lowell for help romancing Marcy.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam tries to give Andi the perfect 20th wedding anniversary gift by re-creating their honeymoon.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Kobe and Mario Frittoli, who both learned from masters of Italian cuisine, will face off in this battle of broccoli.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto engages Challenger Masayoshi Kimura in this battle of rice.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chef Sakai, known as the Iron Chef French, will have his hands full in this battle specially designed around Wedgwood china.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a master chef hailing from Kyoto. He has the support of the former Iron Chef Michiba and Dr. Yatori. Can the Iron Chef win this battle?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a seafood expert who chooses and masterfully cooks gifts from the sea. He has apprenticed in the top kitchens of Japan. Which competitor will find the soul of the sea?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a stubborn chef descended from a long line of Tokyo dwellers. The Iron Chef will have his hands full facing such a strong tradition.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is one of the few Mexican food specialists in Tokyo. This is a Latin duel at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Andre Pachon is the leader of the French chef community in Japan. Several of his apprentices have already appeared, but this time Pachon sends his number one man.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The younger sibling of the Liang brothers, rulers of Cantonese cuisine in Japan, faces the Iron Chef Chinese.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen engages Challenger Lian Su Qin using konnyaku, a unique Japanese healthy food.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a woman who knows what she likes. As an elite culinary critic, she trained at Le Cordon Bleu and as well as Taillevent, an elite French restaurant in Paris.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The former Iron Chef Michiba decides that Morimoto needs some help finding his feet, so he recruits his number one sous-chef from his own days at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Japan's culinary media is dominated by today's challenger, a food critic, musician and graphic artist. Kentaro is determined to make a name for himself at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The Iron Chef Italian is challenged by a chef hailing from Kyoto who never ceases to pack his restaurant with customers.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Morimoto fights a traditionalist chef who fills his dishes with nostalgia.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Meiji Kinenkan is the oldest bridal hall in Japan undergoing an upgrade to celebrate its 50th anniversary. This includes the addition of a Chinese restaurant and its new grand chef.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen stirs up his best yogurt presentation against Challenger Junichi Ito.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto battles with Challenger Tsuyoshi Kajimoto as they innovate with abalone, a shellfish.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The Iron Chef is called upon to face Miyoko Sakai, a famed Thai food critic who has had the privilege to learn the secrets of royal Thai cuisine straight from the source.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Dan and the team take on the restorations of a 1965 Mustang fastback and a 1951 Studebaker truck. The mustang is for a friend whose plans are far bigger than his budget, and the Studebaker needs a unique design to make it a world-class show vehicle.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Firepower Operation
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Dave traded for his dream 1957 Corvette more than three decades ago, but his plans to build it have so far come to nothing. Ken chose a rare 1954 Kaiser Darrin from his father’s collection and its now on FantomWorks to reverse the hands of time.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Bob spent years working on his beloved 1969 K20 Truck, but he needs FantomWorks to solve the mysteries within. Dan’s brother-in-law John shows up with a 1962 Ferrari kit car that looks hot, but the wiring could burn it to the ground.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Steve has only driven his prized 1969 Camaro Z28 at five miles an hour, but he wants it to be a muscle car beast. Scott owns a rare matching numbers 1964 Corvette that he wants brought back to life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Nick bought his wife Danielle a 1953 Chevy Pickup for her 28th birthday. The couple wants a perfect FantomWorks restoration. The truck has other ideas. Eric’s rare 1939 LaSalle is a sight to behold, but it hasn’t seen a wrench in eighty years.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Rick comes to FantomWorks for a nightmare combination of gadgets, gizmos, and upgrades for his 1972 Cadillac Hearse. Merlyn and Lynn are farmers from Minnesota with a 1959 Chevy Apache that’s so dangerous they’ve never driven it beyond their driveway.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and Jan are visiting Mecum Auctions in Houston, Texas checking out some of the coolest classic muscle cars about to hit the auction block!

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Ian wants a 1956 ‘baby bird’ restomod that drives like a sports car. Dan’s solution – a GTO-Thunderbird combo that drives like a bat out of hell. Doc Pellerin’s 1937 Volvo was a regular winner at Concours car shows – until a shelf fell on the car…

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Patsy and Apryle bring their 1968 Corvette in for mechanical work, but what their car really needs is a new paint job. Jim’s 1958 Impala is an auction car. It looks pretty but when it’s time to drive – it’s half the car Jim was hoping for.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Mark Unwrapped
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Roaming the Restorations
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: The 63 Z06 is getting more fiber glass work done on the inside. Vinnie is working on replacing the windows on the 442 and putting the guts in the door. Plus, we head to Galveston for the Galveston Corvette Show.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team at Muscle Cars of Texas install airbags on the 48 Dodge. Team gets ready for the Galveston Classic Car show.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Arnold brings Dan two interlocking projects. He wants FantomWorks to transform his 1946 Ford Panel Wagon into a classic tour-mobile, and he also wants Dan to fix the 1941 Harley Flathead motorcycle that will ride in the back.

programme.title: The Ride Life
programme.desc: Japanese car culture holds a special place in Sung's heart. He's back exploring the home of drifting to see the coolest mods, and quirkiest characters. Sung finds that a quest for brilliance and excellence makes this the best place to get inspired.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Ben wants a partial restoration for his father’s 1962 Maserati, but Dan sees only one solution – turning this heirloom into one of the rarest survivor cars on earth. Raymond and Diane only want one thing for their worn out 1966 bug – perfection.

programme.title: The Ride Life
programme.desc: Despite a troubled past of poverty and invasions, Korea has emerged as a car building power-house. Through its unheralded and talented-loaded car scene, Sung reconnects with the land of his birth and finds peace with his estranged mother.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are getting the sound system ready inside the 1969 Mustang Malicious Intent. The 1950 Ford has miles of wiring to install.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are priming the 1972 Nova to help prevent it from rusting. We take a look back at all the cool stuff that has happened in the shop.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Rocket Method
programme.desc: Ronnie O'Sullivan teaches snooker fundamentals, guiding viewers through the essential skills and techniques to improve their game, the Rocket Method.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 er den nye hurtige og spennende versjonen av spillet! Kom og se ukentlige konkurranser, arkiv spill, studio segmenter og mye mer.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Featuring coverage of the World Seniors Snooker 900 tournament.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Featuring coverage of the World Seniors Snooker 900 tournament.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker legends compete in a one-day spectacular at Goffs venue in County Kildare. Ken Doherty and Jimmy White compete in the final.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker legends compete in a one-day spectacular at Connexin Live, Hull. Groups A & B, Igor Figueiredo Vs Ken Doherty and Jimmy White Vs Tony Drago.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker legends compete in a one-day spectacular at Connexin Live, Hull. Groups A and B, Stephen Hendry vs Tony Drago and Barry Pinches vs Igor Figueiredo.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker legends compete in a one-day spectacular at Connexin Live, Hull. It is Semi-Final time! Ken Doherty Vs Jimmy White and Tony Drago Vs Igor Figueiredo.

programme.title: The Crucible Cup
programme.desc: Snooker 900 er den nye hurtige og spennende versjonen av spillet! Kom og se ukentlige konkurranser, arkiv spill, studio segmenter og mye mer.
